title: Gypsy Rooftop Restaurant & Bar
address: 20 Đống Đa, Street, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Myla Lazaro-Bondoc
user_reviews.Description:
My husband and I had a wonderful dining experience at this Michelin-star restaurant in Da Nang. From the moment we arrived, everything felt special. The ambience was beautiful—elegant, relaxing, and perfect for enjoying a memorable meal together.

The food was absolutely great. Every dish was carefully prepared, full of flavor, and beautifully presented. You can really see the attention to detail in every plate that comes out of the kitchen.

What impressed us the most was the service. The staff were warm, attentive, and very professional. They made sure we felt welcome and comfortable throughout the entire evening.

A very thoughtful touch was when they gave me a flower in celebration of International Women’s Month. It was such a simple but meaningful gesture that made the experience even more memorable for us.

Overall, it was an excellent dining experience for both of us. Great food, wonderful ambience, and truly top-notch service. We would definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting Da Nang.

user_reviews.reply_text_original:
Hi Myla! Thank you so much for the glowing review. 🌟

We are touched that you felt our experience reached such high standards! It’s wonderful to hear the International Women’s Month flower and our team’s attentive service made your night special. We’ll be sure to share your kind words with the whole kitchen and floor team.

Hope to welcome you and your husband back to the rooftop soon!

Warmly,

The Gypsy Team

user_reviews.Name: Saiko Freak
user_reviews.Description:
We chose this rooftop restaurant in Đà Nẵng to celebrate my wife’s birthday, and it turned out to be an unforgettable evening. Perched high above the city, the panoramic view was simply stunning seeing the city lights, and coastline coming together beautifully as the sun set.

The team went above and beyond to help me plan a surprise mini birthday setup. From the discreet coordination to the thoughtful decorations, everything was handled with care and genuine warmth. Seeing my wife’s reaction made the night truly special.

Dinner was equally impressive. The food was well-presented, flavours balanced and refined, and each dish paired perfectly with the drinks. The cocktails were crafted with precision — refreshing, smooth, and ideal for a relaxed celebration in the sky.

What really stood out was the service: attentive without being intrusive, friendly, and sincerely invested in making the celebration memorable.

As a tourist, this rooftop dining experience delivers on atmosphere, service, and heart. A night we’ll both remember for a long time. Thank you!

user_reviews.Name: Kelly Lee
user_reviews.Description:
Came here on 1/31 for my birthday dinner. They did a fantastic job with the decorations and our server, Alice, was great. Excellent service 10/10.

We ordered the octopus salad, shrimp salad, truffle pizza, masala pasta, braised pork cheek, and the sea bass. For dessert we had the tiramisu and cheesecake.

All of the dishes were cooked perfectly, seasoned very well, and had good portions. Really glad I chose this restaurant to celebrate my birthday, food + service were truly excellent, you can tell the staff are trained very well. Definitely recommend!!

user_reviews.Name: John Gibson
user_reviews.Description:
My wife and I had dinner at Gypsy for my wife's birthday on Friday April 24th, 2026. From the moment we walked through the entryway we knew the night would be something special. The service was exceptional - staff constantly ready to top up glasses etc, without being in any way intrusive. The food was beautifully prepared, cooked and presented and was absolutley delicious. Chef prepared a special amuse bouche which was divine. We started with oysters and the goat's cheese salad. Although the oysters are a little smaller than we are used to in Australia, they were excellent. The goat's cheese salad was delicious. For mains, I had the mushroom rigatoni and my wife had the seafood risotto and they were both absolutely delicious. The wine list was pretty extensive and reasonably priced for Vietnam, where wines can be quite expensive. We finished off with the blueberry cheesecake, presented with the staff all singing "Happy Birthday".
We had such a great night that as we were walking out, we made another booking for our last night in Danang. We highly recommend Gypsy rooftop - it was a sensational experience.
Update; we returned on Monday night 4th May 2026. The scallop tartare was delicious, as was the salmon spaghetti. Service was again sensational. We will definitely be back next time we visit Danang.

user_reviews.Name: Adelita
user_reviews.Description:
I decided to come to Gypsy Rooftop because I thought it was cool spot to see the city of Đa Nang from.  I have to say that this spot blew my socks off.  The poolside lounge has a 180° view of the city and is tastefully decorated with an option to dine inside the restaurant.

The restaurant offers a fusion of Mediterranean cuisine with a Vietnamese flare.  I ordered the waygu linguine and my partner ordered the truffle rigatoni.  The noodles we done to perfection, the meat portion was plenty, and the PORTIONS were rather large (I can't believe I'm writing this :o).  The servers ended up adding more truffle aioli to my partners dish, which we thought was a hit overkill, as the rigatoni was quite rich.

I honestly think that the portions could be a little bit smaller because the dishes are rich with flavours that it is impossible to eat the whole thing; the prices should also reflect the smaller portion sizes.

The service was top notch.  All the servers spoke english and we're well versed in suggesting wine pairings to along with the dishes.  My partner absolutely loved the cocktails he had there.  Needless to say, we'll be going back before we leave.

user_reviews.Description: One of the top restaurants in Danang for a reason. All our dishes were exceptional. Best of all the service was really great too, everyone was very proactive and warm. This place was a great choice for us to celebrate our anniversary. Special shoutout to Dong, who made our dinner particularly pleasant with his hospitality. Highly recommend The Gypsy!

user_reviews.Name: Georgia Adams
user_reviews.Description:
Incredible view, amazing food and friendly staff!
We came here for my mums birthday and we couldn’t have had a better evening!! The waiters could not do enough for us and were so friendly, the food was so delicious (especially the steak which was cooked in front of us), and the interior was so lovely!
Such an amazing experience and evening - the staff also brought out a desert with a candle in it and sang happy birthday for my mum! Overall really great evening, would definitely recommend and will be coming back!!

user_reviews.Name: Masha Master (MASTER BLOGGER)
user_reviews.Description:
Absolutely amazing experience!

I visited this restaurant with my sister, and we were genuinely impressed from the very first moment. The atmosphere is beautiful and welcoming, but what truly makes this place special is the incredible service. The staff is exceptionally attentive, warm, and professional — you can really feel the care in every detail.

The food was outstanding. The carpaccio was perfectly balanced and full of flavor, and the lava cake was simply unforgettable — one of the best I’ve ever had! Every dish was beautifully presented and absolutely delicious.

We left feeling happy, satisfied, and truly grateful for such a wonderful evening. This is the kind of place you want to come back to again and again.

Highly recommend — thank you for such a memorable experience! ✨

title: Ăn Thôi
address: 114 Bạch Đằng, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Anna Krzak
user_reviews.Description:
We had a real feast at An Hoi. Because the restaurant is so popular and Michelin-recommended, I expected rather small portions, so the two of us made the strategic mistake of ordering four dishes. As soon as the soup arrived, I realized that was far too much. The portion was definitely much larger than what you usually get for a similar price in other places. It was also excellent: deeply aromatic, full of greens, choy sum and cabbage, with very tender young squid stuffed, I believe, with finely minced fish, plus clams that added even more flavor to the broth.
The highlight of the meal, however, were the grilled oysters, topped with peanuts and green herbs. They were absolutely delicious, not overcooked, still slightly soft and delicate in the center, which gave them a wonderful texture. The morning glory was also memorable, as it came with peanuts and meat, a combination I had not encountered before and found very successful. The fresh spring rolls were tasty and well filled, although the rice paper itself was slightly too tough and chewy for my taste.
We had to wait about 30–40 minutes for a table, but the whole process was very well organized. You are given a number, and the numbers are called when your turn comes. The staff were also very efficient, quick and attentive to what was happening in the dining room, bringing extra sauces as soon as they noticed something had run out and responding promptly to customers’ needs. The restaurant was busy, lively and clearly very popular, but the food fully justified its reputation. An Hoi definitely deserves its Michelin recommendation.

user_reviews.reply_text_original:
Cảm ơn bạn đã dành cho Ăn Thôi một đánh giá tích cực.
Chúng tôi rất vui khi được phục vụ bạn những món ăn hợp khẩu vị.

Hy vọng Ăn Thôi sẽ tiếp tục là điểm đến bạn muốn quay lại trong tương lai.
Hẹn gặp lại!

user_reviews.Name: Lucian
user_reviews.Description:
Had a lovely lunch here! Came on a weekday around 11am and as there are no reservations, waited 15 mins for a table (you collect a numbered ticket from the staff and wait for your number to be called).

The food took around 20 minutes to arrive and they looked (and tasted) amazing. The seafood fried rice was plated beautifully and extremely flavourful without being too sweet. The grilled scallops with scallions were fresh and had a nice texture. The shrimp with garlic sauce was plump and juicy, and the mango smoothie was thick and refreshing. The morning glory was the only dish that wasn’t amazing, it was tasty but similar to other restaurants we’ve tried in Danang.

The staff were extremely friendly, from offering to peel the shrimps to giving us sharing plates, always serving us with a friendly smile.

Really glad i got to try this place on my last day in Danang, hope to be back again sometime soon

user_reviews.Description: Dinner at An Thoi was definitely worth the wait! Even though we waited almost an hour for a table, the food made up for it. We tried the pineapple fried rice served in a fresh pineapple, refreshing buko juice, crispy bánh xèo, flavorful spring rolls, and perfectly cooked scallops — every dish was delicious and full of flavor.

user_reviews.Name: Fritzie Relucio
user_reviews.Description:
The spring rolls with kebab noodles doesn’t look that appetizing but was surprisingly delicious, very flavorful, and satisfying.
The fried crepe was fun to make and very yummy.
The fried baby shrimps were simple, it was sweet and we put them together with the other dishes.
Our kids liked the cheesy scallops the best.

Servers were very polite and attentive.

We did have to wait for a table.
But once the food came, it made sense why the place was busy. The wait was truly worth it.

Definitely worth the wait.

While the menu is simple, the food is really good and appetizing, especially the shrimp garlic sauce and the grilled scallops. Service is impeccable too. Best of all, prices are quite reasonable. We will definitely come back here again the next time we visit Da Nang.

user_reviews.reply_text_original:
Đánh giá 5 sao của bạn chính là món quà tuyệt vời nhất đối với nhà hàng chúng tôi. 

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết món ăn của Ăn Thôi đã làm chuyến đi của bạn thêm trọn vẹn.
Chúc bạn gặp nhiều may mắn trên hành trình còn lại, và rất mong được gặp lại bạn trong một ngày gần nhất!

user_reviews.Name: Nicole Bennett
user_reviews.Description: Probably one of the best meals of my life.  So good in fact that I went back again in the same week!  The Beef Pho is my favourite of all time - it has a rich and Smokey flavour and the beef is fantastic - not gristly at all.  The Pineapple Seafood Rice is on another level.  So sweet and the seafood is great.  The Seafood Noodles have a unique flavour that is addicting and you wish you had two portions.  And the Bahn Xeo was very tasty - they will even help you roll it up if you want.  We also really enjoyed the spicy morning glory.  The staff are also really friendly abs the atmosphere is great.  You might have to wait a little bit to get in as they don’t take reservations but the time goes quick and they offer you cold bottles of water while you wait which is so kind especially on a hot day.  I would recommend this place to anyone who wants to enjoy a fantastic meal at an even better price!

title: Bistecca - Italian Restaurant in Da Nang
address: 20 Đống Đa, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

owner.name: Bistecca - Italian Restaurant in Da Nang (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: John
user_reviews.Description: Excellent place to treat yourself to a nice meal, if/when you get tired of the street food scene and the "fast food" (i.e., pizza, burgers) or "fast casual" scene (i.e., dine-in places around An Thuong).  The beef cheek, spaghetti ragu, spaghetti with fish roe were all excellent.  Atmosphere included a live piano player, and the view of the city was skyline.  Service staff was courteous and well-trained.  Great change of pace and place and would recommend for special occasions, or just to mix things up and treat yourself!

user_reviews.Name: Mark Kalisch
user_reviews.Description:
6 diners, 5 nationalities and only 1 person really satisfied. We were the only patrons at the time as we were early. Maybe we got them on a bad day but we all felt like the menu was trying too hard and the kitchen not even close to pulling it off.

Food presentation was pleasing but the tastes and textures were truly unacceptable for the level.

Some nice presentation touches including finishing the steak and pepper sauce table side and then offering a knife selection from a beautifully crafted box with a variety of "weapons".

One of the group was very vocal about our displeasure and they offered all of us complimentary coffee or tea.

The service team was excellent and the location is lovely but the food really let them down.

Maybe the kitchen was fully focused on the 30+ person group that came in as we were finishing but that should not happen in a professional kitchen.

So many other options here so will not repeat.

user_reviews.Name: Darina Dolbina
user_reviews.Description:
I was looking for a place to celebrate my birthday, and some of the comments made me hesitate. However, I made the absolutely right choice!

The staff speaks excellent English, contrary to what some reviews said. The prices are fantastic — we ate so much and expected the bill to be higher, but it wasn’t! The presentation of the dishes was beautiful, and the food was incredibly delicious.

Everything was perfect, and I’m absolutely happy with my choice!

user_reviews.Name: Joshi Christudas
user_reviews.Description:
The Best Anniversary Ever!

We were celebrating our 5th wedding anniversary and looking for a restaurant in Da Nang with the perfect ambiance—and we’re so glad we found this gem! What initially caught our eye was the decorations packages and we decided to give it a try.

To our delight, the experience exceeded all expectations and gave us memories we'll cherish for a lifetime. From the beautifully decorated dining space to the warm and welcoming atmosphere, everything was simply perfect.

A special shoutout to Chau, who was incredibly sweet, professional, and attentive. Her thoughtful service made us feel truly special and added a personal touch to our celebration.

The ambiance was dreamy, and the food lived up to every bit of our expectations. Thank you for making our anniversary so unforgettable

title: Bếp Cuốn Đà Nẵng - Michelin Selected 2025-2026
address: 31-33 Trần Bạch Đằng, An Hải, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

owner.name: Bếp Cuốn Đà Nẵng - Michelin Selected 2025-2026 (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Sven Oliver
user_reviews.Description:
With more than ten thousand reviews and an average rating of 4.9, curiosity alone almost obliges a visit. And what can be said in retrospect is simple: the experience could hardly have been better. I arrived alone for a quick lunchtime snack and chose the king prawns with butter and garlic, along with summer rolls filled with barbecue pork.

Both dishes delivered immediate satisfaction. The king prawns carried a rich, aromatic balance between butter and garlic, allowing the natural sweetness of the shellfish to remain clearly present. The summer rolls offered a pleasant contrast through their freshness and delicate wrapper, enclosing a savory barbecue pork filling that was well seasoned and satisfying in its own right.

Service was swift and efficient, which suited the lively rhythm of a busy lunch service. Considering that the entire meal including a drink came to the equivalent of under thirteen euros, the value is frankly difficult to rival. Even at midday the place was notably full, a sign that its reputation is clearly well earned.

It is the kind of place that invites repeated visits simply to continue exploring the menu.

user_reviews.Name: Wesley W.
user_reviews.Description:
​From the moment you step into Bếp Cuốn, you’re greeted by a beautifully designed setting that manages to feel both authentic and sophisticated. It is a total "well-oiled machine"—despite the extensive menu and the bustling atmosphere, the service is seamless, polished, and incredibly welcoming.
​The Culinary Highlights
​The food here is a vibrant celebration of Vietnamese flavors:
​The Showstopper: Our absolute favorite was the Fried Snakehead Fish with Mango. The contrast between the perfectly crisp fish and the bright, tangy mango was phenomenal.
​The Savory Classics: The Beef in Betel Leaf was truly awesome—smoky, tender, and deeply aromatic. We also loved the chicken wings, which were seasoned to perfection and incredibly tasty.
​The Perfect Refresher: We couldn't get enough of the Calamansi juice. We ordered a pitcher, and it was so refreshing and zesty that we immediately ordered a second!
​A Word of Advice
​While the decor and atmosphere make you want to linger, the secret is definitely out. We were lucky enough to be seated immediately, but by the time we finished our meal, a massive line had formed for lunch. Reservations are highly recommended if you want to skip the wait and dive straight into one of the best meals in Da Nang.

user_reviews.Name: Cebu Food Critic
user_reviews.Description:
Our best foodie experience for authentic Vietnamese cuisine. The local flavors and hospitality are the highlights.
Bếp Cuốn Đà Nẵng is a popular local restaurant in Da Nang, especially known for its banh xeo, fresh spring rolls, and grilled skewers. Dishes made with fresh shrimp and pork blend perfectly with peanut sauce, offering a delightful crispy texture. The cozy, homey interior is loved by locals and welcomes tourists, providing warm, friendly service. It’s a popular spot where both the food and the prices leave customers very satisfied.
We were greeted and seated. The place is very large with 3 areas for dining.
First order was the best Bahn Xeo. Seafood version, the waitress made the first one for us. Textures, freshness and wow all in one bite, so Excellent.
Second order was Chao hai San, seafood congee with rice it was delicious.
Third order was their Goi Cuon tom, fresh rice paper shrimp rolls. Big plump and super yummy sauce
Last order Cahn ga rang la chahn. Crispy chicken wings, glazed with garlic, lime and fish sauce. They were very good.
The portions are generous, the flavors are superb and the service is great.

user_reviews.Name: Michelle Barnedo
user_reviews.Description:
Bep Cuon was such a great way to start our vacation in Da Nang. Easily one of our favorite meals during the trip. The food was really good and everything we ordered was flavorful and fresh. I especially loved the lemongrass drink, it was so refreshing and honestly one of the best drinks I had during the trip.

The place gets really crowded, so I definitely recommend making a reservation if you can. They also close around 9 PM, so it’s better to come earlier rather than too late.

Overall, such a good experience and definitely worth visiting if you’re in Da Nang.

user_reviews.Name: Rennie Lee
user_reviews.Description:
A Michelin guide restaurant! It’s crowded but the sitting area is pretty big- there’s both indoors and outdoors. I’ll recommend to make a reservation to guarantee a seat, as it seem there are some small tour groups coming here too.

I’m impressed, no wonder it’s Michelin guide! Definitely upholds some quality and standards in the food. Everything was yummy and served pretty quick (most importantly, the food was still hot).

I don’t know what to recommend as I enjoyed everything 😂 However what stood out for me was the lotus stem salad, rly refreshing, never tried this before! Spring rolls were good too! Pineapple fried rice was interesting, cooked in a coconut base. Fried noodles pretty nice. Morning glory rly fragrant from the garlic. Crispy pork belly was so yummy esp with the spicy sweet sauce!

Recommend to visit! Must come for your Danang trip too!

user_reviews.Name: Raj Masani
user_reviews.Description:
We had such a fantastic experience here! Even though we arrived just before closing and the restaurant was quite busy, the staff still welcomed us warmly and provided superb service from start to finish.

We ordered all three vegetarian dishes, and every single one was absolutely delicious. The highlight for us was definitely the DIY rice paper wraps — such a fun and fresh experience, and the flavours were incredible.

Everything felt thoughtfully prepared and full of care. We never felt rushed despite the late hour, which made the experience even more enjoyable. Highly recommend this place if you’re looking for great food and genuinely friendly service!

title: Sky View Restaurant
address: 216 Võ Nguyên Giáp, An Hải, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Sergejs Ponomarjovs
user_reviews.Description:
View:
Absolutely outstanding. Panoramic views over the infinity pool, city skyline and the sea. Perfect for photos.

Food:
Delicious and well presented. Quality matches the location.

Service:
Professional, attentive and friendly. Everything runs smoothly.

Things to note:
•	Elevator goes only to the 19th floor – you need to walk up stairs, so it may be difficult for guests with mobility issues
•	Interior feels slightly worn
•	Prices are on the expensive side

Overall:
Highly recommended for the view and amazing photo opportunities. A must-visit spot in Da Nang if you enjoy scenic dining.

user_reviews.Name: Ruben
user_reviews.Description:
Sadly, we arrived with high expectations, but things started going downhill almost immediately. The bread was stale, and the pâté was quite unpleasant. The salad and fish were acceptable, but nothing memorable.

The seafood platter, however, was a real disappointment. While the fish and calamari were just okay, the mussels and scallops were completely tasteless. The tiger shrimp was by far the worst dish—it was so overcooked that it had turned into an inedible paste.

user_reviews.Name: daliberry
user_reviews.Description:
Parasond Hotel - Sky View Restaurant: Da Nang Vietnam a Must-Visit!
My recent visit to Sky View Restaurant in Vietnam Da Nang was nothing short of spectacular. If you are looking for an exceptional dining experience that combines breathtaking views with world-class hospitality, this is the place.

The Food: Truly Amazing
The culinary experience was the absolute highlight. Every dish was prepared to perfection, demonstrating incredible skill and fresh, high-quality ingredients. The menu offered a fantastic variety, and frankly, everything we tasted was amazing. It was a memorable feast that I would gladly repeat.

The Service: First-Class and Flawless
What truly elevated the evening was the first-class service. The staff were incredibly friendly, attentive, and genuinely seemed to anticipate our every need. They couldn't do enough for us, making us feel welcomed and perfectly cared for throughout the entire meal. This level of service is rare and made the entire experience feel special.

Final Verdict
From the delicious food to the flawless, warm service, Sky View Restaurant provides an unforgettable experience. It's a perfect spot for a romantic dinner, a celebratory evening, or anyone seeking the best dining Da Nang has to offer. Highly, highly recommended!

title: Cabanon Palace
address: Cordial Grand Hotel, 21th floor, 27-29 Loseby, Street, An Hải, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Rachel
user_reviews.Description:
I had such a wonderful night out with my family at this place! If you’re looking for a spot with great vibes and even better food, I can’t recommend it enough. The food was honestly fantastic. We tried a bunch of things, but the crab soup was a total standout, and the Wagyu beef prime rib steak was incredible—so juicy and cooked just right. Also, come hungry, because the portions are very generous. We definitely didn't leave wanting more!

What really made the evening special, though, was the people. The staff were so sweet and took great care of us. The chefs were also super friendly; they actually came out and joined our family photo, which was such a nice touch. It’s rare to find a place where the service feels as good as the food. We had the best time!
user_reviews.text_original:

user_reviews.reply_text_original:
What a joy to read about your wonderful night out with family, thank you for sharing such a lovely review of Cabanon Palace.
We’re thrilled that the crab soup and the Wagyu beef prime rib steak were standouts for you! And yes, in true South of France family tradition, we believe generous portions are part of the experience. More than anything, we’re happy the team and chefs helped make the evening feel special, right down to joining the family photo. Creating warm, genuine moments around the table is exactly the spirit of Cabanon Palace.
We’d love to welcome you all back again for another unforgettable family dinner.

user_reviews.Name: Ami (Amigo)
user_reviews.Description:
This restaurant is a journey into a chef’s heritage. From the moment you step through the door, you can feel the seamless coordination of the staff; they create a unique atmosphere that instantly transports you from the outside world into a special, refined dining space.
The soul of the food comes from the Chef’s roots in a fishing family. Knowing that the seafood dishes—especially the lobster—are based on his great-great-grandmother’s recipes makes every bite feel incredibly meaningful. You can taste the generations of tradition and passion in the depth of the flavors. I looooved the crab bisque so much that I honestly wished I could carry it in my tumbler everywhere I go!
What we loved:

• The Seafood: The French oysters with that fantastic onion sauce and the scallops were exceptionally good with their delicate sauce.

• The Signature Dishes: The Foie Gras with brioche and the Butcher’s Steak with red wine sauce were cooked to perfection.

• Warm Hospitality: It was heartwarming to learn that the team includes family members. That genuine, family-run warmth shines through in their attentive service.

• The Wine: An excellent selection. I loved the specific bottle the staff recommended based on my preferences—it was a perfect match.
Even my daughter thoroughly enjoyed her pasta! Whether you are a local or just visiting, this restaurant is a must-visit for anyone who appreciates food made with true heart and history. We will definitely be back.

Strongly recommended.

user_reviews.Name: Trudy Cheung
user_reviews.Description:
I visited Cabanon Palace for dinner with my family to celebrate Mother’s Day and we were truly disappointed with the overall experience. Before we went, we read the Google reviews and expected a high-quality restaurant. Unfortunately, the evening fell well short of our expectations.

Our experience began as soon as we arrived. We were asked to wait in the lift lobby for over five minutes. I had already explained to the receptionist that some of our family members had arrived, but we still had to wait outside the restaurant. This felt unreasonable.

The food was also disappointing. We ordered the crab bisque, which the owner described as one of their signature dishes. However, it tasted like a regular crab soup and lacked any “wow” factor. In addition, the restaurant did not provide soup spoons and we had to use serving spoons to eat the soup.

For the main course, we ordered crab pasta, prawn gnocchi, stuffed squid, and tomahawk. The crab pasta was served cold. The tomahawk was dry and difficult to chew. When the owner spoke to us earlier introducing their menu, he mentioned that he would cut the tomahawk at the beginning, but this was not done at the end.

Given the repeated issues with both service flow and food quality, I feel this restaurant did not meet even basic expectations for the price. The experience was consistently disappointing—from the unnecessary waiting upon arrival to the lack of proper utensils and the poor quality of the mains. We also were never asked at our table whether everything was okay. Overall, the service and the food simply do not worth the price. We will not be returning.

user_reviews.Name: 劉奕廷
user_reviews.Description:
I had an amazing dinner at Cabanon Palace and was truly impressed by the overall experience. The restaurant is located on a high floor with a stunning night view of Da Nang, and the atmosphere feels elegant and upscale. The space is quiet, comfortable, and perfect for a date night or a special celebration. From the moment we were seated, the service was excellent—staff members were attentive and took time to explain each dish, which made the whole dinner feel even more special and well-prepared.

The food was the highlight of the night. Every course tasted great, and you can really tell the ingredients are high quality. The flavors were rich and well-balanced, and the pacing from appetizer to main course felt smooth and enjoyable. I especially want to compliment their braised eggplant, which was incredibly flavorful and perfectly seasoned—so tender and deeply infused with taste. The crab soup was also outstanding: warm, creamy, and very rich in flavor, making it one of the most memorable dishes of the evening.

The steak was also excellent, and it paired beautifully with the sauce. On top of that, the portion size was huge—we were completely full by the end. If you’re looking for a refined dining experience with a beautiful view in Da Nang, I highly recommend giving Cabanon Palace a try!

title: Nhà hàng Nhà Gỗ Việt Đà Nẵng
address: 49 Nguyễn Thái Học, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

owner.name: Nhà hàng Nhà Gỗ Việt Đà Nẵng (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Brandon Nguyen
user_reviews.Description:
Ate here tonight and extremely satisfied! Everything came out fast, but the restaurant happened to not be full when we arrived at 6pm on a Tuesday.

We got 4 things: bun thit nuong, crab fried rice, thit heo kho, 1 nem Vuong, and one mango smoothie. The bun thit nuong was especially flavorful with the sauce. The crab fried rice was good, would’ve liked a little more crab meat personally. Thit kho tastes just like my moms and it was so good. It does need rice with it though since it is a fattier dish. The Nem Vuong was crispy and hot when it came out, paired well with the sweet nuoc mam sauce. My mango smoothie was sweet, but I think my mango happened to be more fibrous because I drank it through the straw and kept getting fibers in my mouth. We felt perfectly full with our entire order.

Overall great place and would come again

Buttered prawns was initially overwhelming as we only had 2 pax and it felt really rich. But the Banh Xeo paired with it was so good as the vegetables cut through the richness of the butter.

user_reviews.text_original: This restaurant serves tasty and decent Vietnamese dishes. The service is very convenient, as the staff kindly wraps the Banh Xeo and peels the chili shrimp for customers. Along with the friendly hospitality, it is a great place to enjoy a comfortable meal.^^

user_reviews.Name: CJ Morocillos
user_reviews.Description: This place is a food haven. We really enjoyed the Vietnamese foods even though we did not know how it taste at first. The buttered shrimp is a must try. Place is clean. The staffs are very accommodating. Hoai Ngoc helped us to peel the shrimp’s shell. Overall, it is a pleasant experience and very delicious

user_reviews.Name: Valeriia Kuna
user_reviews.Description: We were extremely satisfied! The food arrived very quickly, tasted delicious, and the presentation was beautiful. We especially appreciated the kids' menu options—our daughter was very happy. The restaurant itself is spacious and clean. Highly recommended!
user_reviews.text_original: We were extremely satisfied! The food arrived very quickly, tasted delicious, and the presentation was beautiful. We especially appreciated the kids' menu options—our daughter was very happy. The restaurant itself is spacious and clean. Highly recommended!

title: The Nomad Kitchen
address: 21-23 An Thượng 32, Ngũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam
plus_code: 362W+8H Ngu Hanh Son, Da Nang, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Steve Carroll
user_reviews.Description:
Arrived here for food at around half twelve on a Sunday. We hadn't booked so sat upstairs as it was fairly busy. We were quickly served, the waitress was lovely and super attentive. We both ordered the buffalo roast dinner and a couple of cold beers. The food was fantastic! The meat was super succulent and all the accompanying vegetables perfectly cooked and tasty. As a Brit I found it to be a first class roast dinner.

The rest of the menu looks amazing too, so I think we will be back very soon. Highly recommend this place 👌

user_reviews.Name: Paul Anderson
user_reviews.Description: Good value roast Sunday lunch. Had 1 buffalo 1 vegan. Buffalo was excellent, meat perfect and a great mix of vegetables and roast potatoes. The vegan was good, although the 'sausages' were a little lacking in substance and flavour.. rather like a lentil base. Stuffing was too hard, but the manager was indormuand will address.. very professional..👍👌🙏 extra roast potatoes were beautiful and extra gravy. Lovely exceptional service and professional on every level....👌🙏😍

user_reviews.Name: Wayne Watts
user_reviews.Description: Went for the Sunday Roast and I was not disappointed!  I went with the lamb and it had all the fixings you would expect. Almost like a proper Thanksgiving meal 😀. The lamb was served with a nice mint sauce to compliment it. Coffee was good but the strawberry smoothie was just ok and needed a lot more strawberry in it and to be thicker as a smoothie should be. Good, attentive and smiling staff. Fair pricing for what you get!

user_reviews.reply_text_original: Thank you so much for joining us for Sunday Roast and for taking the time to share your feedback. We're delighted to hear you enjoyed the lamb and the classic fixings — we love that you compared it to a Thanksgiving meal! We also appreciate your comments about the strawberry smoothie; we’ll definitely take that on board to improve. It’s wonderful to know you found our team attentive and friendly. We hope to welcome you back soon for another great meal!

user_reviews.Name: Kimberly Quesenberry
user_reviews.Description: Another beautiful experience in Da Nang. Such sweet employees and fantastic menu.We started with the salad that has truffle mushroom cheese and oh my....I did not want to share.  I ordered the red talapia, grilled and we'll done. It was prepared perfectly, for me, and the side of vegetables were delicious. My husband had a steak sandwich. We ended with apple pie with a scoop of dark chocolate ice cream and a scoop of coconut. It was more of a tart filled with apple sauce, instead of pie, but it was good. Definitely recommend The Nomad Kitchen.

user_reviews.reply_text_original:
Thank you so much for sharing such a lovely and detailed review!
We’re delighted to hear that you had another beautiful experience with us in Da Nang. Our team will be so happy to know their sweetness and service made an impression.

We’re thrilled that you enjoyed the truffle mushroom cheese salad (it is hard to share!), as well as the grilled red tilapia with vegetables and the steak sandwich. And thank you for your thoughts on the apple pie — we’re glad you still enjoyed it along with the chocolate and coconut ice cream.

We truly appreciate your recommendation and hope to welcome you and your husband back again soon!

user_reviews.Name: GRANDMA VƯỢNG’S CHARCUTERIE
user_reviews.Description:
I’ve been eating at The Nomad Kitchen for a few years now, and what keeps me coming back is the consistency. It’s one of those places you can rely on as every visit delivers the same level of quality, care, and attention to detail.

The food is always well-executed, with a clear focus on good ingredients and thoughtful preparation. Nothing feels rushed or careless; there’s a steady standard here that’s hard to find.

Service is just as consistent, professional, attentive, and genuinely welcoming without ever feeling overdone.

For me, it’s a dependable go-to: a place you can count on for great food, real quality, and top service every time.

Thank you for trusting us with your meals for so long—we can't wait to serve you again soon!

user_reviews.Name: Sabrina Minerva
user_reviews.Description:
EDIT after owner response: the waiter was male which is why my partner even noticed because he used the toilet as well. One of the kitchen staff (male) has washed his hands thoroughly after using the toilet so we noticed the waiter.
Thanks for the info on the mussles, I did not know that. Therefore apologies.

Staff was very friendly. Prices are quite high for the portion size. Unfortunately, one of the waiters went to the toilet and did not wash his hands afterwards. In my opinion this is not acceptable if you serve food to customers.
One mussel on my plate had a funny color so I did not eat that and a tomato of my partners salad tasted weird too.
So for this high price we decided to go somewhere else for the rest of our stay.
We were offered free dessert afterwards.
user_reviews.text_original:
EDIT after owner response: the waiter was male which is why my partner even noticed because he used the toilet as well. One of the kitchen staff (male) has washed his hands thoroughly after using the toilet so we noticed the waiter.
Thanks for the info on the mussles, I did not know that. Therefore apologies.

user_reviews.reply_text_original:
Hi Sabrina,
Thank you very much for your detailed feedback. We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience, and we are very sorry that it did not fully meet your expectations.

Regarding the hygiene concern you mentioned — we want to make it clear that proper handwashing is a strict rule in our restaurant, and we agree that it is absolutely unacceptable if it is not followed. However, we would also like to gently clarify that if the staff member you saw was female, there is a sink inside the women's restroom, so she may have washed her hands inside and this might not have been visible from outside. That being said, your concern is valid, and we are reinforcing hygiene procedures with our team to ensure this never becomes a doubt for our guests.

About the mussels — just to clarify, male mussels naturally have a paler/white color while female mussels are orange. Both are completely normal and safe when fresh, but we fully understand how this could be concerning if not expected.

We are also sorry to hear about the salad and that the overall experience did not reflect the quality we aim to provide. Your feedback is very important for us to improve.

Thank you again, and we hope we will have the opportunity to welcome you back and give you a better experience.

Warm regards,
The Nomad Kitchen


EDIT, thanks for specifying we will make sure never happens again. Thank you for your time to edit, about mussels, I just realized not that long ago as well.

user_reviews.Name: Hattrick’s Hoi An
user_reviews.Description: Things don’t get much harder than hosting Christmas Day but Nomad Kitchen absolutely nailed it. The food was superb and one of the best Christmas Dinners I have eaten. We had a large group of 20 and whilst service wasn’t rapid, we didn’t want it to be, it’s Christmas Day, we wanted to sit drinking, eating, socialising and enjoying the atmosphere. Fair play to the chef and all his staff 👏🏻

user_reviews.Name: Zara
user_reviews.Description: The food wasn’t bad but a bit overpriced for what you get. The service was lovely though, especially the girl with the tattoo, very friendly and spoke good English, and had such a warm smile. She really stood out!

title: Nhà Bếp Xưa Restaurant
address: 64 Hà Bổng, Sơn Trà, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Lee Wieden
user_reviews.Description: Came here for lunch for the first time on a Wednesday, was abit hard for us to find, but its like most places with a narrow frontage. Trying to find a park for our bikes out front was quite hard too. It was very busy with locals and tourists which tells us the food must be good so were excited to try it out. Once your seated, trying to grab someone to take your order is abit hard, but once you do order we didn't have to wait too long for our food this visit.  Although we did hear that at dinner time its abit harder to get a seat and slower service because it is so busy. But keep in mind its the sort of place you go in, eat up and get out. We ordered a few different things from the menu and it was all very enjoyable, so we understand why it gets a good rating here. We heard there is usually a line up outside at dinner time, so patience is needed, plus to get served. There is good airconditioning inside which is a relief on those really hot days and nights. Its not a huge restaurant inside, alot of movement of people coming and going. Parking our bikes outside in the street was abit of a nightmare but if your on foot, you will be ok. But anyway we enjoyed our lunch time visit, so this will be our new go too from now on for good Vietnamese food

user_reviews.Name: Eat the world
user_reviews.Description:
The spicy seafood soup was decent overall, but the seafood had a rubbery texture, most likely indicating the use of frozen, lower-quality products, to put it mildly.

Outside the tourist areas, a bowl like this would cost roughly half the price. That said, in fairness, I have yet to come across a place, tourist area or not, that serves this soup with truly fresh seafood.

user_reviews.Name: Kamil kamas
user_reviews.Description: Great experience! The food was delicious, especially the fried spring rolls – they were definitely my favorite. Prices are very reasonable too. The staff is friendly and welcoming. Highly recommend to everyone!
user_reviews.text_original: Great experience! The food was delicious, especially the fried spring rolls – they were definitely my favorite. Prices are very reasonable too. The staff is friendly and welcoming. Highly recommend to everyone!

user_reviews.Name: ivanas_tastykitchen
user_reviews.Description:
I didn’t realize just how hyped this place was until we arrived. Luckily, we came at the right time and only had to wait about five minutes—but I’ve since heard waits can stretch to 45 minutes or even an hour.

That said, it’s absolutely worth it. The food quality is on another level—everything tasted incredibly fresh, and we were genuinely impressed with our meal. While it’s not exactly a hidden gem and definitely draws plenty of tourists, there’s a clear reason it’s earned Michelin recognition.

If you don’t mind a potential wait, this place more than delivers.

user_reviews.Name: Rafaela Liana Shen
user_reviews.Description: A cozy restaurant with a relatively small space, yet efficiently managed with a quick table turnover. We visited during dinner time and experienced a short wait of around 10–20 minutes. Service was prompt and well-organized. The food was enjoyable and satisfying, offering a pleasant local dining experience, though the flavors lean more towards familiar rather than standout.

user_reviews.Name: Sean Hyland
user_reviews.Description:
Such a lovely lunch here. All the food is delicious. Seafood fried rice, chicken wings and Quang noodles with shrimp and pork.

Service is great, and it came so quick.
user_reviews.text_original:
Such a lovely lunch here. All the food is delicious. Seafood fried rice, chicken wings and Quang noodles with shrimp and pork.

user_reviews.Name: Steven Hammond
user_reviews.Description: Food came out in a random order, mains before appetisers, flavours a little bland. Service is friendly but they really struggle when busy, portion sizes are massive.
user_reviews.text_original: Food came out in a random order, mains before appetisers, flavours a little bland. Service is friendly but they really struggle when busy, portion sizes are massive.

user_reviews.Name: Sanketa Salunke
user_reviews.Description:
We discovered this little cozy spot during our trip to Da Nang and ended up coming back for dinner night after night! Just a short walk from the beach, it’s clearly popular with tourists. The staff is young, not very fluent in English, but incredibly polite and eager to help.

We faced a small challenge finding vegetarian options for my mom, but they were kind enough to prepare a vegetarian version of their pineapple fried rice.

We ordered:
•	Tom chay toi (shrimp with garlic)
•	My Quang Ga Trung (Quang noodles with chicken and egg)
•	My Quang Dat Biet (Quang noodles with shrimp, egg and chicken)
•	Pineapple fried rice with seafood
•	Morning glory with steamed rice
Mango smoothie

Service is fast, the food tastes fresh, and hygiene is good. The bathroom is clean as well. There isn’t much of a formal ambience, but the thick wooden benches, simple setup, and lively vibe make it feel warm and inviting.

A great spot for tasty local food — definitely worth a visit if you’re in Da Nang.

title: Riverside Terrace Restaurant
address: 493 Đ. Trần Hưng Đạo, An Hải, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Tereh Garcia
user_reviews.Description:
We had a wonderful dining experience at Riverside Terrace Restaurant. The food was absolutely delicious — every dish was flavorful, fresh, and beautifully presented. The rooftop view was the highlight of the night, with an amazing riverside atmosphere that made the whole experience even more special and relaxing.
A special thank you to Van, our waitress, who was incredibly attentive, friendly, and very fast with service. She made sure everything was perfect throughout our meal and always checked on us with a smile. Great food, stunning rooftop views, and excellent service — highly recommended when visiting Da Nang!
user_reviews.text_original:

She made sure everything was perfect throughout our meal and always checked on us with a smile. Great food, stunning rooftop views, and excellent service — highly recommended when visiting Da Nang!

user_reviews.Name: Esther Tobin
user_reviews.Description: Incredible food with incredible views. If you're in town and need a break from the local food, this is the place. Most ingredients are imported from Italy, and it shows. The pasta is perfectly al dente, and the cesar salad is probably internationally the best. Be sure to make sunset reservations as tables on the top floor terrace get snapped up quickly, but if you come in at around 4pm, the table choice is yours.

user_reviews.Name: Ellanah Broadway
user_reviews.Description: From the moment we walked in we knew we were going to have a good night. Straight away the owner came over and introduced himself. It was amazing to hear and see how passionate he is about his restaurant and his customers. This restaurant is located with an amazing view of the dragon bridge. Our food did take an hour to come out, however, it was worth it!! The lasagne is amazing! The owner compensated due to the wait time and let us up on the terrace to watch the dragon bridge show! I would recommend booking in advance to get a table on the terrace if you are wanting to see the show as there is limited seating and the restaurant is very busy! I have to give credit to the staff too who were so attentive and helpful.

user_reviews.Name: Nick Gauci
user_reviews.Description:
We had the pleasure of dining at this fantastic Italian restaurant in Da Nang city centre and decided to take a night off from local cuisine. It was definitely worth it.

The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming from the moment we arrived. We chose to sit on the balcony. The stairs were a bit of a workout (haha), but absolutely worth it for the beautiful view. We even caught the sunset, which made the experience even more special.

The food was delicious. I ordered the chicken parmigiana, which came with a side of pasta, and the flavours were spot on. The portion sizes were just right, leaving you satisfied without feeling too full.

Overall, I loved the vibe of this place. It’s relaxed, inviting, and perfect for a great meal. If I’m ever back in Da Nang, I’ll definitely return. Highly recommend if you’re in town and craving some quality Italian food.

user_reviews.Name: Kasie Holmes
user_reviews.Description:
We had the most magical, unforgettable dining experience at Riverside Terrace ✨🌙🤍

From the moment we walked in, everything felt elegant, spotless and welcoming absolutely immaculate 🌸🤍
The rooftop setting was breathtaking, overlooking the Han River with the stunning Dragon Bridge glowing at night 🐉🌉✨ The lights reflecting on the water, the gentle breeze, the romantic atmosphere , it honestly felt like a fairytale, and so perfect for our honeymoon memories 🥂💕
It was one of those pinch me moments where everything just felt magical 🥹💫

The service was truly incredible 🙌💖 We let the staff know about our allergies when ordering, but unfortunately they weren’t written down correctly, so one of our pasta dishes came with ingredients we couldn’t eat 😔🙏 With allergies that can be worrying, but the way the team handled it was so professional, calm and genuinely caring. They replaced the meal immediately with kindness and absolutely no hesitation 🍝✨ No stress, no awkwardness just heartfelt care and reassurance 💗

And the food wow 🤤🇮🇹 The pasta replacement was delicious, and the Parmigiana was absolutely divine full of flavour, perfectly balanced, rich, wholesome and comforting in every single bite 😍💫 The texture was beautiful, the presentation stunning, and you could truly taste the quality ingredients. Proper fine dining Italian made with love 🍆🧀🍅✨

Then, while we were still dining, the staff surprised us with a complimentary dessert 🍰💝 AND a free drink 🍹 as an apology. Such thoughtful, generous service that honestly touched our hearts 🥹💞 It wasn’t expected, but it showed how much they genuinely care about their guests’ experience. They even kindly took beautiful photos for us with the Dragon Bridge and Han River glowing in the background 📸🐉🌆 giving us memories we’ll treasure forever 💕

And honestly we were shocked at how affordable it was 😍💰 For an entrée, two mains and three drinks it was only about $35–$40 AUD total (around 550,000–650,000 VND) 🤯✨ Incredible value for such a stunning rooftop fine dining experience with that level of service and those views 💖

We loved everything so much we came back twice during our stay in Da Nang ❤️ And we would return again in a heartbeat 💫

Beautiful rooftop views 🌉✨
Incredible Italian food 🇮🇹🍝
Kind, thoughtful, attentive staff 💖
Romantic fairytale atmosphere 💕
Amazing prices 💰✨

Highly, highly recommend ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ If you’re in Da Nang, don’t miss this gorgeous place you’ll feel so looked after, so appreciated, and completely enchanted 🌹🥂💫

And the food wow 🤤🇮🇹 The pasta replacement was delicious, and the Parmigiana was absolutely divine full of flavour, perfectly balanced, rich, wholesome and comforting in every single bite 😍💫 The texture was beautiful, the presentation stunning, and you could truly taste the quality ingredients. Proper fine dining Italian made with love 🍆🧀🍅✨

Then, while we were still dining, the staff surprised us with a complimentary dessert 🍰💝 AND a free drink 🍹 as an apology. Such thoughtful, generous service that honestly touched our hearts 🥹💞 It wasn’t expected, but it showed how much they genuinely care about their guests’ experience. They even kindly took beautiful photos for us with the Dragon Bridge and Han River glowing in the background 📸🐉🌆 giving us memories we’ll treasure forever 💕

And honestly we were shocked at how affordable it was 😍💰 For an entrée, two mains and three drinks it was only about $35–$40 AUD total (around 550,000–650,000 VND) 🤯✨ Incredible value for such a stunning rooftop fine dining experience with that level of service and those views 💖

We loved everything so much we came back twice during our stay in Da Nang ❤️ And we would return again in a heartbeat 💫

Beautiful rooftop views 🌉✨
Incredible Italian food 🇮🇹🍝
Kind, thoughtful, attentive staff 💖
Romantic fairytale atmosphere 💕
Amazing prices 💰✨

Highly, highly recommend ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ If you’re in Da Nang, don’t miss this gorgeous place you’ll feel so looked after, so appreciated, and completely enchanted 🌹🥂💫

user_reviews.Name: Raghib Albalushi
user_reviews.Description:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ A Wonderful Italian Dining Experience Near Dragon Bridge

I had such an amazing time at this Italian restaurant near Dragon Bridge. The food was absolutely delicious, and the staff were incredibly helpful and attentive throughout my visit.

One of the highlights was meeting the owner—he was playing guitar when I arrived, creating a warm and charming atmosphere. He even took a moment to speak with me, and his kind words and welcoming attitude truly made the experience unforgettable.

The restaurant also has a beautiful rooftop, which is the perfect spot to enjoy the Dragon Bridge fire show on Fridays, Saturdays, and Sundays at 9 p.m. The view is fantastic, and the show lasts about 10 minutes—definitely worth seeing!

The whole place is cozy, beautifully decorated, and full of character. Combined with the amazing food and wonderful service, it’s a place I highly recommend to anyone looking for a memorable evening near Dragon Bridge.

user_reviews.Name: Sophia Twigger
user_reviews.Description:
Best tiramisu I've ever had in my lifeeee!!
Amazing creamy cheesy salmon pasta with sizeable salmon chunks (I was licking my plate) lychee cocktail to die for and to finish it off the most delectable tiramisu (and I'm tiramisu obsessed) in an adorable mug that made my entire week.
Service was lovely and attentive (we were served by the wonderful Hau) top location and lovely warm atmosphere.
So many food options to choose from!!
Overall no complaints, a delicious experience, I'm full and happy.

user_reviews.Name: Jaz
user_reviews.Description:
The staff are polite and the setting was quite beautiful with nice decoration. The cheese pizza was very good with the chewy texture and just right balance of the 4 types of cheese.
However, the squid ink spaghetti was too oily and the texture of the carbonara one lose the elasticity as it were flat and seemed overcooked, the seasoning of the soured cream one may need some improvement where it was far too heavy ; the chocolate cake was far too sugary and lack of the moisture , as it was not a freshly-made cake, texture taste like the supermarket very rough one

user_reviews.Name: Homer
user_reviews.Description:
I am genuinely shocked by how many 5-star reviews this place has. All the tapas were severely under-seasoned. The pizza was not exactly subpar, but it was basically the equivalent of a thin crust Domino’s pizza in terms of flavor. So if you think Domino’s is phenomenal pizza, then this might work for you.

You can taste the cheese, but you cannot distinguish any other flavors. Nothing stands out. Everything is aggressively mediocre at best. Overall, this place is just sad.

I do not understand how it has so many 5 star reviews, and I have no idea how they justify their pricing. Honestly, going here feels insulting as a customer. Do not do yourself a disservice.

Da Nang has so many amazing food options. Go literally anywhere else. You would be better off going to 7 11 and buying snacks there. They will taste better and be more satisfying than anything served here.

This place is depressing. If you truly hate yourself, then sure, this is a great place to go because that is exactly what you deserve.

user_reviews.reply_text_original:
Thank you for the 5-star rating on our service and atmosphere. It is quite sad though that someone would feel the need to return home and spend their time trying to insult others so aggressively online.

We are proud of our 5-star reputation and the many guests who find joy in our tapas and pizzas. While we’re sorry our flavors didn't suit you, we find it a bit of a stretch to compare handmade cuisine to 7-Eleven snacks. We hope you find whatever it is you’re actually looking for in Da Nang, as it clearly isn't here. Best of luck.

user_reviews.Name: Sakshi Arora
user_reviews.Description: Visited Danang for 3 days and came here twice, once for lunch and another time for dinner. The hosts are amazing and make you feel right at home. We had the patata bravas and it was exquisite. Tabla de Ibericos was an unreal experience. We loved the agnolotti, so creamy and delicious. Do try the saigon Cider.cheers

title: Bếp Hên
address: 47 Lê Hồng Phong, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 84236, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Kristian Kæmsgaard
user_reviews.Description:
The restaurant is beautiful and very cozy, with a thoughtfully designed interior that makes it a lovely place to sit and dine. Some of the dishes were genuinely delicious and full of flavor.

However, the atmosphere felt quite hectic during our visit. The young waitstaff seemed stressed and very busy, which made the service feel rushed rather than relaxed.

I ordered the sweet and sour chicken, which unfortunately contained quite a lot of bones. I personally prefer boneless chicken, so this wasn’t ideal for me — though I understand that others may appreciate it, and I might simply be a bit picky.

The restaurant also doesn’t offer desserts.

user_reviews.Description:
Such a good find would highly recommend this restaurant.

Refreshing to see a high-quality restaurant serving authentic Vietnamese food but also not being one of the restaurants that has loads of fake reviews like a lot of others.

We had snake headed fish stirfry, frog, seaweed, and pork soup and caramelised pork. Very delicious and a fair price. Overall four dishes rice, two beers and two waters came to 600 K. Pretty reasonable in my opinion.

title: Si Dining Restaurant
address: 01 Giang Châu 2, Ngũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 50500, Vietnam
plus_code: 26JQ+36 Ngu Hanh Son, Da Nang, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Liana Lee
user_reviews.Description:
A truly memorable dining experience.
Every dish was beautifully presented like a work of art, with incredible attention to detail and clear passion from the chef. The flavors were well balanced, ingredients tasted fresh, and from appetizers to desserts, everything was impressive and thoughtfully crafted.
Just one small suggestion: I think the owner should consider adding more lighting at the front entrance where the elderly security guard stands. My husband and I arrived around 7:30 PM, and I honestly got a little startled because under the tree, in the dark, I suddenly noticed a silver-haired man standing there. I even rubbed my eyes twice before realizing he was smiling at me. It turned into a funny memory, but better lighting would definitely make guests feel more comfortable upon arrival.
After dinner, we left completely satisfied. The flavors were rich and well rounded, with a beautiful fusion of Western cuisine and Vietnamese vegetables. I really like this place.
The service here is even more refined than some high-end restaurants. Often when staff serve Asian guests, they don’t always introduce the dishes, but here the F&B team was extremely professional, attentive, and confident in explaining every course.
The atmosphere is cool and relaxing, and the background music made the entire evening feel comfortable and enjoyable.
Food: 100/100
Service: 100/100
The surrounding area is quiet, with convenient car parking available.
Prices are reasonable and not overly expensive for the quality you receive.
Tip: Make a reservation in advance to ensure the most attentive service.
We will definitely be coming back.

Dear Ms. Liana Lee,
Thank you so much for taking the time to share such a detailed and heartfelt review. We’re truly honored to know that the dishes, service, and overall atmosphere made your evening a memorable one. Your kind words mean a great deal to Chef Alessio and the entire team, and we’re especially happy to hear that you felt well cared for throughout the experience.

We also sincerely appreciate your thoughtful suggestion regarding the lighting at the entrance. Your feedback has been noted and shared with the team, as guest comfort and a warm first impression are very important to us.

Thank you again for dining with us, we’re delighted to know you left fully satisfied, and we look forward to welcoming you back for another relaxing and enjoyable evening very soon 🤍

Si Dining

user_reviews.Name: Lan Pham
user_reviews.Description:
Generous, tasty amuse bouche. Expertly prepared Italian dishes using local ingredients. Good cocktails, also paying homage to local artisans. The ravioli sauce was so good, I asked for a slice of sourdough to finish. Thank goodness they brought two slices bc it was an unbelievably light, airy, crispy delight. They kindly helped me order a fresh loaf from their Em Bakery in Hoi An for next-day delivery.
Wine list has amazing scope, including Czech and Lebanese wines. Shout-out for the sparkling clean RIEDEL Winewings stemware.
Desserts were sublime. Chef-owner's family background of bakers is also evident in the ethereal millefoglie, each crispy bite fragrant with rich butter.

A gracious gentleman opened our car door upon arrival, then lovely young staff greeted us at the door and proceed to take excellent, warm care of us.

Elegant new enclosed space with AC and cozy mood lighting.

Though a pity that we didn't get to meet busy Chef Alessio, grazie to all for a wonderful experience!

user_reviews.Name: monny
user_reviews.Description:
Delicious fine dining experience with attentive waiters and chef Alessio who comes out personally to check on the customers and make conversation.

Presentation of the entrees was lovely and the desserts were to die for. Prices very reasonable given we are not locals. Their moscato on offer was light, refreshing, and sweet while not being too overbearing.

The mille foglie was the most delicious desert I've had in a while. I could honestly eat a metre by metre squared of it.

Recommend this restaurant highly for both food and service.

user_reviews.reply_text_original:
Dear monny,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share such a generous review. We’re truly delighted to hear that your evening with us was so enjoyable.

It is always Chef Alessio’s pleasure and joy to step out of the kitchen, connect with our guests, and personally ensure each table is well taken care of. Your kind words about the presentation, the desserts, and especially the mille foglie have been shared with the entire team, and they truly made our day.

We’re also glad you enjoyed the Moscato and found the experience both memorable and well balanced. Thank you again for dining with us, and we hope to welcome you back soon, perhaps for another (very generous) slice of mille foglie. 🤍

Si Dining

user_reviews.Name: Her Dolce Vita
user_reviews.Description:
We visited for Valentine’s Day with high expectations, especially given the Michelin Selected status. Overall, the experience was pleasant enough, but unfortunately not memorable enough for us to return.

We began with the oyster, abalone and snail salad. The oysters were fresh and enjoyable, but the abalone was very tough. As this was our first time trying it, we may not be experts, but from what we have seen elsewhere it is usually sliced very thinly and trimmed more carefully. This version was quite chewy and could definitely have been prepared better. Tabasco was also not brought with the oysters and we had to ask.

There was also an issue with our reservation. My partner booked well in advance for Valentine’s Day and received confirmation, yet our booking was somehow not in their system when we arrived. As the restaurant was very busy, we were genuinely worried we might not be able to dine. The staff handled the situation politely and offered prosciutto and a glass of champagne while we waited, which we appreciated, but it was still surprising that this happened.

The pork shoulder with truffle and horseradish cranberry potato foam was good but not particularly exciting. The menu even lists it as “foarm” rather than foam, which felt slightly careless for a Michelin Selected restaurant. Visually and texturally, the potato element was more like a cream or light sauce. Flavour wise it was good, though missing a real wow factor.

For mains, the seaweed fed lamb was served in three styles. The slow cooked piece was excellent and very tender, but the lemon jam was almost impossible to taste, which was slightly disappointing. The lamb brasato with gnocchi was tender and enjoyable, but the pecorino was barely noticeable despite being a cheese that normally has a strong, salty presence.

Dessert was the biggest letdown. As an Italian, I was especially interested to see how the classic desserts would be interpreted. The panna cotta was very plain and lacked the creamy vanilla depth one would expect. I do appreciate when restaurants create modern twists on classics, but the cannoli felt a bit confusing. The menu simply lists cannoli, ricotta cream and pistachio, so we were expecting something closer to the traditional texture and structure. What arrived was quite different, particularly the shell, and flavour wise the pistachio and ricotta notes were very muted. The coconut cream was pleasant, but it did not feel very Italian.

We were also served small chocolate bites with the bill. While the gesture was appreciated, they were extremely bitter and not particularly enjoyable.

Service throughout was friendly and professional. The overall plating was neat but did not quite feel at Michelin Selected level. Overall, the meal lacked some of the depth of flavour and technical precision we would expect at this level. The concept feels closer to contemporary European fusion with Italian references rather than a traditional Italian approach. It was an enjoyable evening, but not one we would choose to repeat.

For mains, the seaweed fed lamb was served in three styles. The slow cooked piece was excellent and very tender, but the lemon jam was almost impossible to taste, which was slightly disappointing. The lamb brasato with gnocchi was tender and enjoyable, but the pecorino was barely noticeable despite being a cheese that normally has a strong, salty presence.

Dessert was the biggest letdown. As an Italian, I was especially interested to see how the classic desserts would be interpreted. The panna cotta was very plain and lacked the creamy vanilla depth one would expect. I do appreciate when restaurants create modern twists on classics, but the cannoli felt a bit confusing. The menu simply lists cannoli, ricotta cream and pistachio, so we were expecting something closer to the traditional texture and structure. What arrived was quite different, particularly the shell, and flavour wise the pistachio and ricotta notes were very muted. The coconut cream was pleasant, but it did not feel very Italian.

We were also served small chocolate bites with the bill. While the gesture was appreciated, they were extremely bitter and not particularly enjoyable.

Service throughout was friendly and professional. The overall plating was neat but did not quite feel at Michelin Selected level. Overall, the meal lacked some of the depth of flavour and technical precision we would expect at this level. The concept feels closer to contemporary European fusion with Italian references rather than a traditional Italian approach. It was an enjoyable evening, but not one we would choose to repeat.
user_reviews.reply_text_original:
Dear Her Dolce Vita,
Thank you for taking the time to share such a thoughtful and detailed reflection on your Valentine’s Day visit. We truly appreciate the care you put into describing your experience.

Regarding the reservation, we understand how concerning it must have felt upon arrival. While we were pleased to accommodate you promptly and ensure your evening continued comfortably, we have since reviewed our booking procedures to prevent similar situations during peak service.

We also appreciate your reflections on the abalone preparation, flavour balance, and dessert interpretations. As our kitchen continues to evolve, feedback like yours helps us refine both technique and expression to resonate with a broader range of palates while maintaining our culinary identity. 
Attention to detail is important to us, and the menu typographical error you noted has been corrected.

We’re very glad to hear that our service team left a positive impression during your visit.

Valentine’s Day naturally carries high expectations, and while we’re pleased you found the evening enjoyable overall, we are always working to make each experience more memorable. Thank you again for dining with us and for sharing your experience.

 Si Dining 🤍

user_reviews.Description:
This was a very good experience of a fine dining in Da Nang. We had the signature menu with 8 courses. They all tasted nicely but I think some dishes could be taken away as it was a lot of food

Like the abalone salad and the pigeon dish. Especially the pigeon dish could be improved by smoking it more or cooked it more. It was a bit too raw.

The wagyu beef was very heavy as last dish. Could be placed a bit earlier.

Also, as an italian restaurant, I also missed the typical italian dishes. A bit more pasta inspired dishes would be nice.

But overall a very good experience.

user_reviews.Name: Calvin Bui
user_reviews.Description:
Tucked on a quiet side street near the beach corridor, Si Dining feels like a refined little world of its own — warm lighting, intimate tables, and a calm, confident room where the evening unfolds at an easy pace. It reads as modern Italian filtered through Vietnam: elegant, unfussy, and quietly special.

The Food
The kitchen leans into Italian technique with local, seasonal ingredients. Plates arrive composed and balanced — textures that play off each other, sauces that feel precise, and a focus on clarity rather than flash. It’s the kind of cooking where restraint and intention do the talking, course after course. (Chef Alessio Rasom’s philosophy of pleasure and precision shows through the details.)

Service & Atmosphere
Service is polished without stiffness — attentive pacing, thoughtful wine guidance, and an easy grace at the table. The room suits celebrations and date nights, and the team’s accolades back it up: Michelin-Selected and a Michelin Service Award, with a WSET Level 3 sommelier shaping the pairings.

More Details
• Vegetarian options: Limited but handled with care; best to request in advance so the kitchen can tailor courses.
• Dietary restrictions: Team is knowledgeable; flag allergies when booking. Wine pairings can be adjusted.
• Parking: Small residential street — scooter/street parking is tight; ride-hailing is the easiest option.
• Kid-friendliness: A refined, dinner-only environment most nights; better suited to adults or special occasions.
• Wheelchair accessibility: Street-level frontage; interior is intimate — call ahead for the most accessible seating.

Final Take
Si Dining delivers a quietly confident evening — precise cooking, gracious service, and a setting that turns dinner into an occasion. Five stars for craft, hospitality, and a sense of place that feels uniquely Đà Nẵng.

user_reviews.Name: Deb Jackson
user_reviews.Description:
Definitely coming back!
We ordered the dumplings, pork belly xeo, pork Stirfry, and the spring rolls.  We definitely over ordered but we hadn't eaten since 6am!  Everything was delicious.  Decent portions.  The place is obviously well known and popular as it was full.  Staff are great and so is their English!  I think this was the fastest food we've ever been served!
Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: chris cook
user_reviews.Description:
Unfortunately this has been the worst meal I've had in Vietnam. It wasn't disastrous, I didn't get ill, I've just been lucky enough to have amazing food all over Vietnam and this lacked any taste.

The pulled pork didn't fall apart, it was chewy. The kind where you have to chew it for 5 minutes before you can swallow it. The pancakes were tasteless and cold. The peanut sauce again was tasteless and there was barely any of it. I ran out afte 3 pancakes.

Also, the waitress just talked to a Chinese couple next to me throughout the entire meal. A little chat is fine, but 20 minutes of them talking loudly as I'm trying to eat was a little distracting.

The portion sizes were good, the drink was tasty. The price wasn't great, wasn't terrible either for the amount of food you got. The place was very busy and the reviews are generally good, so I may have just had some bad food. Either way I wouldn't come back considering there are so many places out there that do such amazing food.

title: Nén Danang Restaurant

user_reviews.Name: CDF
user_reviews.Description:
Came here to celebrate a milestone birthday and it was such a memorable experience for our family. The food wasn’t only pretty; it was also sumptuous. The hyperlocal non-alcohol pairing made a non-drinker like me enjoy the food even more.

They honored our reservation in spite of an event they had at another location and ensured that the team at the flagship restaurant took great care of us. Shoutout to today’s team at Nen Da Nang for sharing your heart and love via the dishes you prepared. Special thanks to Tho for explaining each dish and drink pairing with such sincerity and passion.

Chef Summer, you are an artist! Thank you for letting us see a glimpse of your experiences through your culinary creations. We had a wonderful time.

user_reviews.Name: kit wong
user_reviews.Description:
I and my family visited the Nen restaurant to celebrate my mother’s birthday this evening. Unfortunately the low-standard food quality in this restaurant really watered down our spirits.
My sister had “the journey “ menu in August last year , she was so satisfied with the food. So we decided to fly all the way long from Hong Kong to celebrate my mother’s birthday. However they changed the menu to “Time”.
The starter we ordered it comes with durian broth which is so weird and not tasty at all.
The main course tasted equally bad. No matter what kind of the story you wanna tell, I think the food at least needs to be tasty.
We are so disappointed with the new menu. And the price is overpriced.we spent vnd 3,666,000 per person.

The only plus side was the well-mannered service that evening and the friendly way in which your waiters patiently heard our complaints.

user_reviews.Name: G. Yong
user_reviews.Description:
Went as a group of 7, spent 4M dong with drink set and sparkling water.

Nen’s lunch course set was amazing and a culinary experience. The server Tor was incredibly polite and took the time to explain each course in careful detail.

There is a drink pairing (alcoholic/non alcoholic) that is available at an add-on price.

I really LOVED the food and the experience. It’s definitely not cheap, but I felt that it was worth the charge for Vietnamese fine dining. The ingredients are unique to Vietnam and each dish is explained by the chef through story cards, which I enjoyed reading.

I would come again with loved ones who have not tried this, or if I am back in Da Nang with a new Story menu. Dessert was AMAZING.

Other than the price being a little steep, there is nothing not to love about Nen. Would recommend trying at least once!

Went as a group of 7, spent 4M dong with drink set and sparkling water.

Nen’s lunch course set was amazing and a culinary experience. The server Tor was incredibly polite and took the time to explain each course in careful detail.

There is a drink pairing (alcoholic/non alcoholic) that is available at an add-on price.

I really LOVED the food and the experience. It’s definitely not cheap, but I felt that it was worth the charge for Vietnamese fine dining. The ingredients are unique to Vietnam and each dish is explained by the chef through story cards, which I enjoyed reading.

I would come again with loved ones who have not tried this, or if I am back in Da Nang with a new Story menu. Dessert was AMAZING.

Other than the price being a little steep, there is nothing not to love about Nen. Would recommend trying at least once!
user_reviews.reply_text_original: Thank you so much G. Yong for taking the time to share your wonderful review. We’re thrilled to know you enjoyed the Story Menu, the unique Vietnamese ingredients, and Tor’s attentive service. Your kind words truly mean a lot to our team and inspire us to keep creating memorable dining experiences. We look forward to welcoming you back for another Nén story soon!

user_reviews.Name: Zoe Hanna May
user_reviews.Description: We are here last night and the experience was exceptional. Tho was our waiter and he could not have made the evening more special. He was so knowledgeable and generous with his time and information, he was a truly story teller adding meaning and depth to every course. The food itself was interesting snd exquisite, and everything about the 9 course menu was so mindful. The music played in the restaurant added to the experience too, and the wine pairings were unusual but sublime, what an amazing night! Would highly recommend.

user_reviews.Name: Joyce
user_reviews.Description:
An incredible dining experience in Nen. Our waiter Tho was exceptional, his knowledge and enthusiasm enhanced the evening. Chef Summer crafted a menu where each dish tells a unique story centered around the theme “Time”. The dish “Heal” especially stood out for me and perfectly encapsulated its meaning. Tho gave detailed explanation and backstory for each dish, making the meal not just about food, but a journey through storytelling.
The use of local ingredients was impressive. Highly recommend Nen for a creative twist on Vietnamese cuisine!
