title: Nhà hàng Madame Lân
address: 04 Bạch Đằng, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Uncle Jacob
user_reviews.Description:
A recommended spot for tourists looking to explore a wide variety of Vietnamese dishes. This restaurant was recommended to me by a Vietnamese friend, which made me eager to give it a try.

The food was absolutely on point and tasted authentic and delicious. The place was also quite busy, which speaks to its popularity among both locals and tourists. The only minor downside was that it could feel a little warm during peak hours, but overall it was a very enjoyable dining experience and well worth a visit.
user_reviews.text_original:
A recommended spot for tourists looking to explore a wide variety of Vietnamese dishes. This restaurant was recommended to me by a Vietnamese friend, which made me eager to give it a try.

The food was absolutely on point and tasted authentic and delicious. The place was also quite busy, which speaks to its popularity among both locals and tourists. The only minor downside was that it could feel a little warm during peak hours, but overall it was a very enjoyable dining experience and well worth a visit.

user_reviews.Name: Bryan Nguyen
user_reviews.Description:
Madame Lan is a beautifully designed restaurant with an impressive setting and layout. The décor and interior are well done, and the open, airy concept makes the space feel fresh and relaxing. We really appreciated having the option to sit either indoors or outdoors, both offering a lovely view of the Han River.
The food came out quickly, which is a plus, though it would have been even better if it were served a bit hotter. The menu selection is excellent, with a wide variety of well-prepared dishes to choose from.
That said, there are a few areas that could be improved. Our table had not been wiped before we were seated, and paper napkins were empty—small details, but noticeable for a restaurant of this level. These preparations should ideally be handled prior to seating guests.
Pricing is higher compared to many local restaurants, but that’s expected given Madame Lan’s Michelin Guide recognition and strong reputation. Comparing it directly to smaller or more casual eateries isn’t really fair.
Overall, we had a good experience and enjoyed the food and atmosphere. With a bit more attention to table readiness and food temperature, this place could easily reach the next level.

user_reviews.Name: Selicia Chia
user_reviews.Description:
1/6/2026 ~ This is our second time dining at Madam Lan during our 3-night stay in Da Nang, and we absolutely love the food. The prawn curry and salted egg crab are especially outstanding,
among the most delicious dishes I’ve ever tasted. Every dish is packed with flavor and prepared to perfection. The service is excellent, and the atmosphere is nice. If you’re visiting Da Nang, Madam Lan is a must-visit restaurant. Highly recommended!

user_reviews.Name: Fran Vázquez
user_reviews.Description:
It's a very good restaurant, especially for foreigners or newbies in Vietnamese food who want to "play it safe".

The food is very nice and the portions are reasonable. But don't expect the best experience or something unforgettable here.

Perhaps what stands out about this place is the excellent service. The waiters are very nice and helpful.

The place itself is cute and very quiet, especially in the afternoon.

It's not as superlative as one might expect (given its reputation), but it's still very good.

Recommended for those who want to try local food but without venturing into a "very local" style.

user_reviews.Name: Angela Chen
user_reviews.Description:
We visited Madam Lân, a Michelin-listed restaurant in Vietnam, and it truly lived up to its reputation. Everything we ordered was delicious.

Their pho was the best we had during our entire Vietnam trip — a must-try. The grilled squid was absolutely outstanding, easily the best I’ve ever had. And the egg coffee… despite being lactose intolerant, I still couldn’t resist and ended up having two cups, even knowing I might suffer later!

Service was warm, friendly, and attentive. The restaurant has beautiful Vietnamese-style decor, and its riverside location makes it even better. After the meal, it’s perfect for a relaxing walk along the river.

Highly recommended — this place is a must-visit when you’re in Vietnam.

user_reviews.Name: Gianmaria Vasini
user_reviews.Description:
Well-known restaurant in Da Nang, often with a queue, probably also thanks to its nice location and pleasant atmosphere.
Unfortunately, the food experience did not meet the expectations.

The eggplant dish was undercooked and quite bland, lacking depth of flavor. The other dishes were fine in presentation, but nothing really stood out in terms of taste or execution. Overall, the food felt simple and unremarkable.

Considering the reputation of the place and the prices, the value for money was disappointing.
Nice setting and good location, but for me, the food does not justify the fame or the wait.

user_reviews.Name: Sarah Lee
user_reviews.Description:
Famous Michelin awarded Vietnamese restaurant located near the river. Place is decorated beautifully similar to the vibes in Hoi An. Plenty of seats available for different group sizes.

Must try the bun bo hue and signature grilled fish. Bun bo hue soup was clear and clean whilst being beautifully seasoned. Bahn xeo wasn’t too oily. Grilled fish was delicious but was slightly overcooked

user_reviews.Name: Jimmy Su
user_reviews.Description:
I would say if you are in Da Nang for the first time give this place a try. It gives me din tai Fung vibes. Food is delicious but not exceptional but what stands out is the view of the Han River and the decor of the restaurant.

The staffs were nice and attentive even though it was packed. I only had to wait 5 minute for our table without reservation on a Thursday lunch.

I would order the special grilled fish, nem ran (shrimp egg roll stuff with meat) scorched rice, ca kho tho (grouper) and morning glory again.

I would’ve given this place a 5 star but the grilled squid came out cold and their barley was any fish in my ca kho. You can skip the banh beo here and banh it ram.

Definitely go to this place once for the experience but if you wanna eat good food for cheap then ask the local. This restaurant menu is too big so they are master of none.

title: Xóm Mới Garden Đà Nẵng - 씀모이가든 다낭 맛집
address: 222 Trần Phú,phường Phước Ninh, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 552760, Vietnam

owner.name: Xóm Mới Garden Đà Nẵng - 씀모이가든 다낭 맛집 (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: やまぐちさくら
user_reviews.Description:
The value for the price was excellent. Overall, the food was delicious, and the service was comfortable and pleasant.

In particular, the bánh xèo had excellent texture and flavor, showing a high level of technique. On the other hand, the Cơm Chiên Hải Sản felt slightly oily.

There were also many Korean guests in the restaurant, which showed that the restaurant was doing very well.

user_reviews.Description:
The restaurant is absolutely beautiful and very well designed. I especially loved the garden dining setup—it creates a wonderful atmosphere. The staff were incredibly attentive and friendly, which was truly the best part of the experience. If I could give 20 out of 10 for service, I definitely would.

The only area where I felt there could be some improvement was the food itself. Based on the 4.9 rating on Google Maps, I expected the flavors to be even better. That said, it was still a good meal overall and a pleasant dining experience.

user_reviews.Name: PC Long
user_reviews.Description: We chose this place for dinner because the facade was so enticing. A lovely and romantic open area in front and a spacious indoor area at the back. We were already pretty full from all the eating the whole day and we were happy that they many items in the menu catering to various appetites. We loved the seafood noodles and bbq prawns. Pricing was similar to other restaurants of similar standing but what sets this place apart is the level of service e.g. they offered to peel the prawns and prepare the spring rolls etc. We appreciated this finer touch as not every visitor knows how to eat or enjoy Vietnamese food.

title: Ky Vat - Vietnamese Restaurant
address: 56a Lê Hồng Phong, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Description: Really amazing food, some of the best I’ve had in Da Nang. The service was impeccable and the decor is stunning. Plus they also have a little speak easy bar upstairs that I’m surely going to come back and try - it’s an intimate sultry vibe! Definitely come here, you won’t regret it!

Thank you so much for your wonderful review! 😊

We're delighted to hear that the food, service, and atmosphere all made such a great impression. Knowing that you consider it among the best meals you've had in Da Nang means a lot to our team.

We're especially pleased that you enjoyed the décor and had the chance to discover The Keepsake Bar. Creating two unique experiences under one roof—a modern Vietnamese restaurant and an intimate rooftop speakeasy—is something we're very passionate about.

Thank you for making Ky Vat part of your time in Da Nang. Whether your journey included Dragon Bridge, Han Market, Hoi An, or Ba Na Hills, we're grateful to have shared part of your experience.

Ky Vat Team 💙

Dr H. NGUYEN

Thank you as well for highlighting our second floor. Many guests looking for a quieter dining experience appreciate its relaxed atmosphere and views over the city, making it ideal for a date night, business dinner, or special gathering.

We look forward to welcoming you back soon. Whether you're enjoying the excitement of DIFF or exploring more of Da Nang's vibrant dining scene, we'd also love to welcome you to The Keepsake Bar, our hidden rooftop speakeasy, for craft cocktails and a memorable end to the evening.

Thank you again for your support!
Ky Vat Team

title: LoCo Restaurant - Danang Seafood Restaurant - 다낭 레스토랑
address: 1C Lê Duẩn, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

owner.name: LoCo Restaurant - Danang Seafood Restaurant - 다낭 레스토랑 (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Yaga Bradhitia
user_reviews.Description:
We had an incredible dinner at LoCo Restaurant and the food was absolutely outstanding! The fresh seafood was incredibly tasty — bursting with flavor, perfectly cooked, and so fresh you could tell it came straight from the sea. Every dish we tried exceeded our expectations. The portions were generous, the prices were very reasonable, and the quality felt truly premium.
What made the experience even better was the fantastic service from Lee and her friends on the team. They were so attentive, friendly, and professional — going out of their way to make sure everything was perfect. They even helped prepare some dishes tableside (the fresh spring rolls were a highlight!). Their warm hospitality turned a great meal into a memorable one. You can really feel the heart and care they put into every interaction.
The riverside location is beautiful, especially with the views. We visited when the Dragon Bridge show was on nearby, so it wasn’t too crowded, which gave us a peaceful and intimate vibe — but honestly, this place deserves way more visitors! It’s a true hidden gem with delicious food and top-notch service that more people need to discover.
If you’re in Da Nang looking for excellent seafood and genuine hospitality, head straight to LoCo Restaurant. We’ll definitely be back soon. Big thanks to Lee and the whole team — you guys are stars! 🙌
Highly recommended!

user_reviews.Name: Simon S
user_reviews.Description: Ambiance, service and food here were fantastic. Portion sizes were very reasonable. We’re just not used to the sweetness of the various cream/cheese sauces and wish it were less (on the oysters and deep fried shrimp). Overall a great time and good location too for people watching as it’s right by an intersection.

user_reviews.Description:
I had an amazing dining experience at Loco Restaurant in Da Nang. The food was delicious, reasonably priced, and every dish we ordered was excellent.

A special thank you to the server, Min, whose service was outstanding. She was attentive, friendly, and made us feel genuinely welcome throughout the entire meal.

The service overall was exceptional, and we were pleasantly surprised to receive a complimentary dessert from the restaurant, which was a wonderful finishing touch to an already fantastic experience.

Highly recommended for anyone visiting Da Nang. Great food, great value, and outstanding hospitality

user_reviews.Name: Iv H
user_reviews.Description:
Our first night and dinner in Da Nang couldn’t have been better at LoCo Restaurant. A great start to our holiday!

Dining at LoCo Restaurant was a wonderful experience. We indulged in their delicious cheese oysters, salted egg crab, pineapple fried rice, cheesy garlic bread, and chicken. Every dish was devoured, and the kids loved it just as much as we did!

A special thank you to Tun for the yummy complimentary floating cake (Bánh trôi – bánh chay). Such a lovely surprise! Photos are included in this review — the cake has a delightful filling inside.

title: Bếp Lụa vietnamese restaurant ( 볩루아 베트남식당 )
address: 94 Bạch Đằng, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

owner.name: Bếp Lụa vietnamese restaurant ( 볩루아 베트남식당 ) (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Javier Aviles-Corsi
user_reviews.Description:
First off I don't know what these other reviews are talking about. I have high standards for food, and have been to many places in Da Nang (as a tourist form Canada).

This is a great mid range restaurant and the portions are appropriate for Da Nang standards. The food is very well seasoned, the seating is nice, the service was very nice, and they accept card. The prices were definitely mid range, more than a local casual spot, less than the tourist traps/high end restaurants. It's very close to Han market (although Con Market is much better anyway).

The food was savoury, extremely well seasoned, and portions were generous (within the context of what a portion size is in Vietnam). I had the braised Fish and seafood fried rice, and both were excellent. The fish especially was extremely rich and flavorful.

Don't listen to these older reviews, or at the very least, understand that my experience was quite great!

user_reviews.Name: 周文睿
user_reviews.Description: I had a highly disappointing experience at this restaurant, and it’s unlikely I’ll return. The oysters were surprisingly small, more akin to an appetizer portion than a main dish, which left me wanting more. The pineapple rice was undercooked, with a texture that felt off, and its flavor was bland, lacking the vibrancy I expected. Additionally, the lemon juice was overly sour, making it difficult to enjoy. Given the high prices, I expected a much better dining experience. There are other restaurants nearby that offer superior meals for a similar cost, and I’d recommend exploring those options instead.

user_reviews.Description: Really like the sinh to xoai. It is exceptionally smooth and the taste of mango is great and seems natural. Other foods are okay. Sadly, their signature dishes were sold out (we arrived at the restaurant after 10pm).
user_reviews.text_original: Really like the sinh to xoai. It is exceptionally smooth and the taste of mango is great and seems natural. Other foods are okay. Sadly, their signature dishes were sold out (we arrived at the restaurant after 10pm).

user_reviews.Name: Bow Boonrawee
user_reviews.Description:
Very disappointing experience. The spring rolls had very little shrimp or pork. The beef noodle dish was extremely oily and overly salty, with no depth of flavor. The tofu was completely bland and soaked in oil. The pork had almost no meat, mostly fat, yet somehow tasted dry, as if it had been cooked a long time ago.

Unfortunately, this was the worst meal I’ve had during my week in Vietnam.

user_reviews.Description:
A cosy restaurant with excellent food.

Food: 5/5 I ordered Da Nang’s  traditional noodle dish - Mi Quang which was tasty, fresh and packed with flavor. I had a mango smoothie which was also tasty.

user_reviews.Name: miu
user_reviews.Description: We didn’t plan to come to this place, but it turned out to be an amazing find. The food is delicious, very affordable, and surprisingly good. The atmosphere is calm and not crowded, the waiting time isn’t long, and most importantly, the vegetables are super fresh. I highly recommend the pork skewers, the deep-fried spring rolls with shrimp & pork, and the pho!

user_reviews.Name: Benson Lee
user_reviews.Description:
Their food tastes delicious, no doubt about that. However, the portions are quite small — we actually had to go for a second dinner after eating here.

Service is probably their biggest area for improvement. The staff seemed a little disengaged, and even simple requests required multiple reminders. The kitchen was also quite slow in getting dishes out.

If they can improve the service attentiveness and speed up food preparation, this place would easily be close to perfect.

title: L'Italiano Restaurant Danang
address: Lot 40 An Thượng 30, Ngũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam
plus_code: 362W+F7 Ngu Hanh Son, Da Nang, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Xavier “Wanderboy” Albert
user_reviews.Description: I liked this restaurant. It was quiet, good service, ok prices. We chose the bruschettas, lasagnas and chicken cream pastas. I would say everything was good, but the bruschettas tomatoes didn't have much taste, and there was no olive oil/seasoning on it. Also, for 6 toasts, there was just 1 leaf of basil! The cream of the chicken pastas was a bit dry, not liquid enough. It was good but this small improvement can make it better. I still recommend it. Thank you!

The cream of the chicken pastas was a bit dry, not liquid enough. It was good but this small improvement can make it better. I still recommend it. Thank you!

user_reviews.Name: Debbie Long
user_reviews.Description:
I’m a bolognese snob and refuse to eat it at most places (actually only one other in San Diego) but I gambled and tried it here only to find it is the best I’ve ever eaten out at a restaurant…and who would believe it would be found in da Nang Vietnam!
Let’s start though with the welcoming staff. Very friendly and accommodating. We didn’t have a reservation but they got us a table for two at the front, inside with ac. We ordered a Caesar salad to share and it was truly big enough for both of us to enjoy prior to our main course.
As I said, I ordered spaghetti bolognese and my husband ordered the pasta with chicken, mushrooms and cream sauce.  Both portions were very large and BOTH delicious.
We were stuffed but couldn’t turn down cheesecake which was absolutely delicious with a chocolate crus and fruit on top.
The owner/manager stopped by each table assuring we were all happy and satisfied and asked us to return, which we will. We have already been spread g the word to everyone we talk to. This is a must try when you have eaten too much rice, Quang noodles and banh mi’s…lol
Goi g to try the homemade gnocchi and pizza when we return this weekend!!!

user_reviews.Name: Dariusz Bialowas
user_reviews.Description:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We just left L’Italiano in Da Nang and honestly, what a fantastic experience.
From the moment we walked in, the owner (a native Italian) personally greeted us in both Italian and English. Super warm, welcoming, and genuinely friendly. You can immediately feel that this place is run with heart.
He invited us to sit, took our order himself, and made us feel completely at home. I ordered the ham and mushroom calzone, and Ela had the soup. The food arrived quickly, and considering a proper calzone takes time to prepare, that was impressive.
But most importantly… the food was absolutely delicious. The calzone was perfectly baked, flavorful, and authentic. You can taste the quality and care in every bite.
If you’re in Da Nang and craving real Italian food with amazing hospitality, this is the place. Highly recommended!
We’ll definitely be back. 🇮🇹🍕

user_reviews.Description:
Both dishes had rich, bold flavors that are easy to like. It’s a handy spot for large groups with diverse tastes or families with kids.

The pizza crust is simple, fragrant, and light. Since it can get packed with tour groups, I recommend booking ahead or checking the crowd before you go.

user_reviews.Description:
L’Italiano Da Nang was a great find! I ordered the blue pepper pasta with gorgonzola; it was perfectly balanced and not too strong. The caprese salad was fresh and delicious, and the garlic bread and pineapple juice were great additions.
The staff was friendly and accommodating, and the patio seating is really nice. I’d definitely come back.
user_reviews.text_original:
L’Italiano Da Nang was a great find! I ordered the blue pepper pasta with gorgonzola; it was perfectly balanced and not too strong. The caprese salad was fresh and delicious, and the garlic bread and pineapple juice were great additions.
The staff was friendly and accommodating, and the patio seating is really nice. I’d definitely come back.

This restaurant became my absolute favorite place during my stay in Da Nang.
Everything was consistently wonderful — from the food to the atmosphere. The pasta gamberi and aglio olio 🤌 the lasagna, salads, and wine were equally delicious.
What truly made the experience special was the ambiance. Warm, welcoming, and genuinely Italian. We even had the pleasure of speaking with the owner, who was incredibly kind and created such a lovely, personal touch.

title: Indian Ganga Dining & Lounge Da Nang - Indian Restaurant
address: 03 đường An Thượng 40, Ngũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam
plus_code: 362V+46 Ngu Hanh Son, Da Nang, Vietnam

owner.name: Indian Ganga Dining & Lounge Da Nang - Indian Restaurant (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Bhuvanesh Prajapati
user_reviews.Description:
While exploring Da Nang, we came across Indian Ganga Restaurant and Lounge, and it turned out to be a comforting stop for authentic Indian food. The restaurant serves a variety of classic Indian dishes along with some Indo-Chinese options, bringing familiar flavors even when you’re miles away from home.  ￼

The food was flavorful, the portions were satisfying, and the prices felt quite reasonable for a tourist city like Da Nang. The ambience is relaxed and the staff were friendly, making it a nice place to sit down and enjoy a proper Indian meal after a long day of exploring the city.

If you’re in Da Nang and craving Indian spices instead of seafood for a change, this place is definitely worth a visit. 🍛🇮🇳

user_reviews.Name: Chandana H
user_reviews.Description:
Okay, I’m actually still not over this.

The chaas was aggressively salty, like it had a personal vendetta against hydration. The lassi? Basically dessert in disguise - I think I consumed my weekly sugar quota in one sip. The food overall felt… tired. Like it had given up before reaching our table.

And the soup quantity? I’m sorry but it was actually a joke - I serve more milk to my cat in the mornings. Like… who is this portion for? A polite sip and emotional damage?

And the worst part? I brought my European friend here for his first Indian meal. His first. I genuinely felt secondhand embarrassment sitting there, trying to defend an entire cuisine while staring at that plate.

The mutton biryani… I don’t even know how to explain this without sounding dramatic, but it was so sad it could humble the most optimistic person alive. Like one bite and suddenly you're re-evaluating your life choices.

And for this experience? 700,000 VND. Gone. Just like that. I’m still emotionally processing the bill.💀

The staff didn’t help either - zero guidance, zero enthusiasm. No recommendations, no warmth. Which is wild, because even the most no-frills Indian spots back home will at least try to make sure you’re eating something decent.

Honestly, I’d recommend this place if:
• you want your Indian friends to start missing fresh Indian food again
• you need motivation to finally learn how to cook
• or you just want to feel something… anything (missing your neighbor aunty's rotis, or appreciating your ex indian girlfriend's average cooking skills)

Safe to say, this meal made me appreciate Vietnamese food on a whole new spiritual level.

Anyway, I need to go heal now. 🫠

user_reviews.Name: Soumya Sachdeva
user_reviews.Description:
Easily one of the best Indian dining experiences I’ve had in Vietnam! The main course was excellent, and unlike many other places, the portions were actually ample and satisfying.

The highlight, however, was the Momos. The red chili chutney served with them is a must-try; it took me straight back to the street-side momo stalls of my childhood. It has that authentic kick, but you can tell it’s made with fresh, healthy ingredients. Plus, the fact that they are open 24/7 is a total lifesaver for late-night cravings. Highly recommended!

user_reviews.Name: Gunjan Khokhani
user_reviews.Description:
Extremely Disappointing for Vegetarians

I visited Indian Ganga in Da Nang after seeing the Google reviews and expected a good experience. However, it turned out to be one of the worst restaurants for vegetarians I’ve ever been to. When I arrived, the restaurant was completely empty, but I still decided to give it a try — unfortunately, that was a mistake.

The food was extremely disappointing. The Tawa roti was unbelievably small — almost the size of my palm — and yet, the prices were very high. We spent nearly 700,000 VND (around seven lakh dong), and apart from the soup, everything else was barely edible. The rotis had an odd sweetness to them, even though we had clearly requested spicy food. It felt as if the chef didn’t understand real Indian flavors at all.

We eventually left most of the food uneaten because it was that bad. What shocked us most was that no one even bothered to ask why we didn’t eat or if something was wrong. The staff seemed completely uninterested in hospitality — only focused on the money.

I’ve tried Vietnamese food during my trip, and it was far better than this. If you are a vegetarian, please avoid Indian Ganga — it’s absolutely not worth your time or money.

title: The View - Yacht Restaurant Da Nang
address: Du thuyền Happy Yacht, An Hải, Đà Nẵng 50400, Vietnam

owner.name: The View - Yacht Restaurant Da Nang (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Kingkong18
user_reviews.Description:
Really enjoyed the view overlooking the Han River and the two bridges. The atmosphere was very relaxing and chill, making it a great place to unwind. I would recommend reserving a table in advance if you want a seat closer to the river for the best experience.

The food was delicious and well-prepared. The only downside was that the main course portion was a little small for a normal appetite. Other than that, everything was great, and I had a very enjoyable experience overall.

user_reviews.Name: Jeff Crawford
user_reviews.Description:
Be sure and make reservations!!

We almost didn't get a seat, but were called back when there was only one table not already reserved.  It appears that this is a favorite restaurant for birthday and anniversary celebrations.

The view from the View is fantastic! Definitely one of the prettiest views of DaNang's skyline and of course, Dragon Bridge is very easy to see.

The menu is a bit pricey for DaNang, but the atmosphere is several notches above the norm. The service and food are pretty exceptional as well. Definitely get your nice clothes on and enjoy an classy night on The View. Perfect for dates and more formal occasions and they are accustomed to hosting groups.

My friends and I tried many dishes. All were exceptional.

I will definitely be back!

user_reviews.Name: Michael Sommers
user_reviews.Description:
I was really looking forward to this dining experience, especially given the restaurant’s incredible location—but unfortunately, it ended up being quite disappointing.

From the start, things felt a bit off. The staff seemed stressed and distracted, which made ordering more difficult than it should have been. It felt like they weren’t fully concentrating, and that set the tone for the rest of the evening.

The food service was particularly frustrating. Our dishes came out at completely different times, so we weren’t able to enjoy the meal together. I had specifically asked for the hotpot to be not spicy, but it came out the exact opposite—extremely spicy—and had to be sent back. On top of that, we requested additional noodles, which never arrived, and to make matters worse, they had run out of Diet Coke. When the diet cokes did arrive they were warm and had no ice.

All of this really took away from what should have been a great night.

The one major positive was the setting—the view was absolutely stunning. Watching the dragon show with such spectacular scenery around us was truly memorable.

It’s just a shame that the food and service didn’t live up to the same standard as the view. Overall, a beautiful location let down by a frustrating dining experience.

user_reviews.Name: Yu-Hsi Wang (Una)
user_reviews.Description:
Jun, 21, 2025
It was an wonderful and delightful night to enjoy DIFF fireworks except the photographer.
I prepared a bouquet for my boyfriend as a birthday surprise and sent it to the restaurant beforehand. After checking in, the two girls at the reception helped me to plan all the surprising details and asked a boy staff to help me around my table.  They even give me braveness and cheered for me when I started my surprising plan. They were just adorable and warming😘😘.
The dishes were fantastic, the staffs were nice and helpful of taking pictures. They also prepared some sparklers for all the customers.
But what annoyed me the most was the photographer. He acted normal until he found a white couple kissing and cuddling together beside our table. The photographer was not taking a photo or two on that couple but kept flashing the camera light on our face.  he acted like he was their private photographer, and the process took over 30 minutes. He was the reason that we left the restaurant so early before the fireworks had finished.

title: MAAZI Da Nang
address: 264 Trần Phú, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 700000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Pete Broady
user_reviews.Description:
Amazing food in a fantastic restaurant. The sounds, sights and amazing smells make this a great culinary experience.

Our server, Suraj went out of his way to explain each dish we were interested in to ensure we had the best experience.

We started with the Papadum & chutney dipping sauce, followed up with the Keema cheese loaded fries, Tandoori Chicken Tikka and then Desi Butter chicken accompanied by Cheese naan, Tandoori Roti and Chappati. Dessert was a delicious Gulab Jamun.

A glass of chilled white wine and an ice cold beer topped off the evening.

I definitely recommend this restaurant if you're chasing Indian cuisine in Da Nang.

user_reviews.Name: Sangita Patel
user_reviews.Description: My sisters and I had dinner here on May 3 and were impressed at how tasty everything was. There was a dish i wasnt impressed with - the pani puri bc the pani/sauce was thick and and had too much ginger for my taste. But the corn app was phenomenal and the paneer tikka masala in the dishes was reallllllly tasty snd the paneer so soft and melty. We also had the shrimp dish which also had a completely different flavor palette than the paneer which was good because sometimes restaurants use the same sauce for everything. The service was also great as within minutes he got us the extras we asked for. Am recommending this place to my family too - high praise.

user_reviews.Name: Annelize Engelbrecht
user_reviews.Description:
We are South African, coming from a country with a large Indian population and a strong love for bold, flavourful curries, so we are quite picky when it comes to Indian food. This meal absolutely delivered as everything we ordered was excellent.

The chicken tikka masala was creamy, well balanced and full of flavour. The chicken was tender and clearly well marinated. The lamb biryani was fragrant and beautifully presented with generous pieces of juicy lamb and a lovely mix of spices. It came with raita on the side which added a nice cooling contrast. The garlic naan was soft, warm and generously brushed with garlic and butter, perfect for scooping up the curries. To finish, we shared gulab jamun, which was warm, soft and soaked in syrup and the perfect way to end the meal.

The restaurant itself has a warm, stylish atmosphere with a lovely bar area and comfortable seating. Service was quick and the staff were genuinely friendly and attentive throughout. The place quickly filled up while we were there and it was just an average Tuesday night. Overall, a fantastic Indian meal in Da Nang and definitely somewhere we would return to and happily recommend.

#danang #indianfood #indiancurry #comfortfood #saffas #saffasabroad #foodies

user_reviews.Name: Rajendra Giri
user_reviews.Description:
MAAZI Indian Restaurant has an amazing location, right next to the famous Dragon Bridge, which makes it perfect for dinner followed by a walk to the bridge to watch the fire show.

The restaurant has enough seating, a clean and neat setup, and a good variety of options on the menu. The food is really tasty, and the portion sizes are satisfying as well.

Highly recommended for anyone looking for good Indian food in a great location. My only small suggestion would be for the staff to smile a bit more often, as most of them seemed quite serious.

We were craving some Indian food and found Maazi on Google with very high rating.

We got pani puri, samosa chaat, tandoor chicken, chicken biryani, butter chicken with garlic naan and gulab jamun. Everything was perfectly seasoned to our likely (we're not Indians so not sure how much authentic this is), definitely better than other places I went to before and I can't wait to go back to Danang just to eat here again.

Mr.Heera and other waiters here were very polite and helpful which made our whole experience even better. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Adriza Chakraborty
user_reviews.Description: Ordered Beer, Cocktail, Makhmali chicken tikka, Tandoori prawns, Butter Naan and Desi Butter chicken. It's a nice place for hanging out with friends and family. Staffs are polite. Food is good with sufficient portions. Price is quite cheaper.

user_reviews.Name: Santanu Satapathy
user_reviews.Description:
During my trip to Da Nang, I was honestly craving some authentic Indian food after continuously trying different cuisines for almost a week. That’s when I visited Maazi Da Nang, and I can confidently say this is one of the best Indian restaurants in the city. The moment the food arrived, it completely brought my taste buds back to life after 7 days of travelling.

The flavors were rich, authentic, perfectly balanced and felt just like home. Every dish was freshly prepared with proper Indian spices, something that is very difficult to find while travelling abroad. The aroma, presentation and taste were simply outstanding. You can genuinely feel the effort and passion they put into maintaining authentic Indian flavors.

Apart from the food, the ambience of the restaurant was warm, clean and welcoming. The staff members were extremely polite, friendly and made sure we were comfortable throughout our dining experience. Service was quick and professional, which made the experience even better.

If you are visiting Da Nang and missing Indian food, then this place is an absolute must-visit. I would highly recommend Maazi Da Nang to every Indian traveller and food lover. Trust me, this restaurant will definitely make your trip even more memorable. 🇮🇳❤️

title: Shamballa Đà Nẵng | Vegetarian Restaurant & Rooftop Bar
address: 277 Đ. Trần Hưng Đạo, An Hải, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

owner.name: Shamballa Đà Nẵng | Vegetarian Restaurant & Rooftop Bar (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Anastazija Vojinovic
user_reviews.Description:
This restaurant really blew us away!! When browsing through the menu, we saw so many dishes we wanted to try so we ended up sharing a lot of the smaller dishes. What a wonderful decision! Highly recommend doing this! Every little plate was delicious and there was so much attention to detail. Also a lot of variety in the menu (which I find very important).

Special thanks to our amazing waitress Phuong, who made our evening even more special and really took care of us. Thank you ♥️

user_reviews.Name: Sven Oliver
user_reviews.Description:
We arrived with high expectations and left, overall, slightly disappointed. Having chosen a wide selection of dishes, the prevailing impression was a certain uniformity of flavor. While repeated use of tofu naturally brings overlap, the coatings could have offered more variation in seasoning or character to create distinction across the plates.

The rice dish with mozzarella gratin unfortunately did little to elevate the experience. The rice itself felt rather plain, lacking depth or nuance, and the topping did not compensate for that simplicity. In contrast, the salad emerged as the strongest element of the evening, offering a welcome diversity of herbs and a more engaging dressing that introduced freshness and contrast.

Considering the pricing in relation to the surrounding dining scene, the experience leans toward the expensive side. Comparable meals, including vegetarian and vegan options, were found elsewhere at significantly lower prices and, in several cases, with more compelling execution.

In summary, while the setting offers a pleasant view and the restaurant remains a viable option for an occasional visit, the overall experience does not fully justify the level of acclaim, particularly in light of its Michelin recommendation.

user_reviews.Name: Huu
user_reviews.Description: Incredible food, charming atmosphere, and welcoming service. The menu features an inspiring story of how the restaurant came to be as well as more than enough options to choose from. The dishes aren’t just vegetarian versions of local favorites, they are thoughtful offerings that stand on their own. The crispy battered mushrooms in shamballa sauce was the highlight of an excellent meal for me. I highly recommend this place if you’re looking for a clean, delicious meal in an intimate setting with astonishing views of the riverfront skyline.

user_reviews.Name: Hannah Cooper
user_reviews.Description: One of the best meals I have had in years 🌟🌱💚 The food here is fresh and delicious and the service is spectacular. We came hungry and were not disappointed 😊 My parter and I ordered the wellness salad, the shamballah mushroom, eggplant spring rolls, Bun Hue and the passion fruit smoothie. Everything was absolutely amazing! Perfectly flavored, filling, and fresh. A huge shout out to everyone working, especially Phuong and Thinh. We hope to return again soon! Would highly recommend to anyone looking for amazing vegan and veg food in Da Nang.

user_reviews.Name: jehiel
user_reviews.Description:
I was there at Valentine's day. Service was slow and nobody knew the numbers of the tables despite having numbers on it. They gave our food to another table and after five minutes they finally realised and just gave us the ice cold food. After that both our soups were also cold and came 20 minutes apart. Rest of the food was okay warm. Maybe they should reconsider their transport system from the  kitchen to 4th floor.

All our 6 dishes lacked of flavour and didn't satisfy us. Had higher expectations regarding the price and the Michelin Bib Gourmand.

user_reviews.Name: Shabrina
user_reviews.Description:
I visited Shamballa three times during my stay in Da Nang because I loved it that much! They have one of the best vegetarian menu selections I’ve seen, with so many great options to choose from, and everything I tried was absolutely delicious. The flavors were amazing every single time.

Their iced yogurt was also so refreshing and honestly one of my favorite things on the menu. I loved it so much! If you’re looking for a great vegetarian restaurant in Da Nang, I highly recommend Shamballa.

user_reviews.Name: Sky Candy
user_reviews.Description: My wife and I LOVED to come here, our favorite dishes were the Banana Curry, and the Signature Rice. We have come here about 7 times with no prior issues but unfortunately this last visit we had to leave right after ordering our food and receiving our drinks because we saw a rat in the dining room. We didn’t even finish our drinks and canceled our order, but we were still made to pay for the drinks dispite this inconvenience. As I previously mentioned we had no issues prior and really loved coming here and returned multiple times to support the establishment. We are honestly shocked we had to still pay for the drinks and that they didn’t seem shocked about a serious health hazard like rodents in the restaurant and for this reason we will not be returning as we don’t feel safe to consume food from here. They didn’t explain or express any actions they would take to rectify the problem. They had us leave without any honest concern which was disheartening because we were coming pretty consistently and thought we were valued customers. Really sad cause we loved the food!  We can understand that pests can be common and things like this can happen but without staff reassurance about corrective actions we were forced to miss out on a meal, and if the case is that they are taking actions to control pests then better communication by staff should have been prioritized. The fact it wasn’t makes me hesitatant to believe that they are serious about any actions they are going to take in the future. It was very unprofessional. Unfortunately because of the lack of communication at the time of the incident what we do know is we couldn’t eat our food and were charged for drinks we also didn’t finish. Sorry but cannot return. In the photos are some of the meals we loved and ate previously.

title: MAMA MASALA INDIAN CUISINE Da Nang
address: 376 Đ. Trần Hưng Đạo, Street, An Hải, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

owner.name: MAMA MASALA INDIAN CUISINE Da Nang (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Tien Vi
user_reviews.Description:
I’ve been here many times for their hot Masala Tea, but this was my first time trying a proper dinner, and it was a pleasant surprise.

The standout dish was definitely the Butter Chicken Masala. Rich, creamy, flavorful, and easily the best thing we ordered. The Garlic Naan was also excellent, freshly baked, with soft and also crispy texture, and perfect for dipping into the curry 🤌🏽

The Tomato Soup was just average and didn’t look quite like the photo on the menu. On the other hand, the Teh Tarik was very good. It had a strong tea flavor and wasn’t overly sweet, exactly how I like it.

The restaurant itself is clean, spacious, and comfortable. There is both an air-conditioned indoor dining area and a pleasant outdoor courtyard. When the restaurant gets busy, the indoor section can become a bit smelly from the food, so if you’re sensitive to smells, the outdoor seating is a better choice.

The location is convenient, the staff are friendly and attentive, and the overall atmosphere is welcoming.

I came expecting just a decent meal, but the food exceeded my expectations. I’ll definitely be back for the Butter Chicken Masala.

user_reviews.Name: Erthe Link
user_reviews.Description:
I stayed at Fivitel Danang and had dinner at Mama Masala Indian Cuisine, which is located nearby.
The restaurant is clean, spacious, and the staff were very attentive.

I ordered Chicken Tikka Masala, Garlic Naan, and a fresh carrot juice.
The curry had deep, rich flavor and the garlic naan was perfectly baked with great aroma. Portions were generous and everything tasted fresh.

One thing to note: the music at first was traditional Indian music. While I understand it’s an Indian restaurant, since this location is outside India, I felt a more international playlist might suit the atmosphere better.
I actually considered leaving because of the music, but one of the staff seemed to notice and turned it off, which I appreciated.

Overall, the food and service were excellent, and I would still recommend this place if you are staying near Fivitel Danang or in the Son Tra area.

title: All Seasons Buffet Da Nang
address: 193 Nguyễn Văn Thoại, An Hải, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Ern Clinton David Santos
user_reviews.Description:
Excellent food! We loved everything, especially the lobsters. Sam, our server for the evening, was terrific! Everything was served promptly, and we were pleasantly surprised that even the seafood shells were taken care of for us. I can honestly say that Sam made our night!

We also noticed that there were still empty tables even though the restaurant was already marked as fully booked. It seems that they prioritize maintaining the quality of their service rather than overcrowding the place when they only have a limited number of servers — which we truly appreciated.

This was an amazing experience for us. Thank you so much!

user_reviews.Name: Zhou Ti
user_reviews.Description:
Phenomenal experience! This is a really great buffet restaurant with a wide variety of dishes. The seafood is extremely fresh and everything was well prepared. The staff all did a wonderful job and were very friendly and attentive throughout our visit.
A special mention to Bao, who was especially helpful and made sure we had everything we needed. His service really made our experience even better.
I would definitely recommend this restaurant to any tourists visiting Da Nang who want to enjoy fresh seafood and excellent service. We had a fantastic time and will happily come back again

user_reviews.Name: Uly Reyes
user_reviews.Description:
What can I say and where does one even begin!!!
To start we had the lobsters and cold seafood tower, followed by surf and turf and the rest was order what you want and when you want until your belly is content.
Full seafood buffet and truly underrated with the quality and taste of all food, we just couldn’t fit anything else lol 😂 from entree to mains to dessert …. This place has it all…

Think of all you can eat buffet but in a degustation style, one by one as per serving and type.
All served fresh, hot and delicious.
It was our honeymoon dinner date and the team even went the extra mile to make a delicious cake with music and service added.

If you order prawns , they even peel the for you! I mean, really…. Def a nice added touch of service with a touch of personal experience.

That’s the good and the experience for us, now to the service, the team was very helpful and professional, but our personal waiter Roy, was impressive, his attention to detail, secure delivery, language and attentiveness is by far the best we’ve had anywhere in the world! Absolutely first class service and def made our experience even more memorable.

Thank you Roy we will def come back and tell all Of our friends and family about our experience and your services … perfect a 10/10.

Highly recommend.

If there is one thing I could say in terms of areas of opportunity- toilets were clean and well matained just a little dated and taps need replacing as it was clearly dripping and left floor in some parts wet and slippery.

Other than that def a place to visit and enjoy the delicious menu and seafood!

user_reviews.Name: Iris Ferguson
user_reviews.Description: I like the atmosphere of the restaurant, it's a perfect balance between modern and warm, rustic comfort. I would recommend this to seafood lovers who appreciate thoughtful presentation and a modern dining experience. Tu was our server and she's the sweetest. She pays attention on our needs and clears the table as soon as we finish so we can start the next set of food with ease. She also offers to peel our shrimps. I was surprised but I appreciate it a lot. She provided good service and dining experience. Aside from their signature lobster dish. I really like the Snapper Carpaccio and Rolled shrimp paste on sugar cane, it's a must try :)

user_reviews.Name: Chloe LI
user_reviews.Description:
We had such a delightful family dinner at this restaurant! The food was outstanding – fresh, flavorful, and generously portioned. Everything we ordered exceeded our expectations.
The seating is very comfortable and spacious, which made it perfect for our group that included young kids and elderly family members. We never felt cramped, and the atmosphere was relaxed and welcoming for all ages.
The service was exceptional. The entire staff was attentive and helpful, but special thanks go to Cherry! She always knew exactly when we needed something – whether it was extra napkins for the kids, help with the menu for our grandparents, or refilling drinks. She was proactive, friendly, and made us feel genuinely cared for throughout the evening.
This is now our go-to place for family gatherings. Highly recommended for anyone looking for great food in a comfortable, family-friendly setting!

user_reviews.Name: wun man lee
user_reviews.Description:
So impressive about staff name Sam!
I was pleasantly surprised that the waitress helped peel the shells! This is rare even in five-star hotels in Hong Kong; the service was excellent and they were very proactive.
The food quality was also top-notch; the seafood was incredibly fresh, and the stir-fries and hot dishes all had that wonderful wok hei (wok aroma). The only thing that fell a little short was the pizza. The prices are the same as online, and you absolutely must book a table in advance, otherwise it's always fully booked.

title: Nhà hàng Làn Gió
address: 169 Trần Phú, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: gabriele comiotto
user_reviews.Description:
Really nice experience in the center of Da Nang. The restaurant is spacious, very clean, fully air-conditioned, and comfortable even during hot weather.

The food quality was excellent, portions were generous, and the prices were surprisingly affordable for how much we ordered. Perfect place for couples, families, groups of friends, or even casual dinners after exploring the city.

I also loved the atmosphere and the view near the Pink Church area. Service was friendly and fast, and overall the restaurant feels modern but still very welcoming.

Definitely recommended if you want good Vietnamese food in Da Nang.

user_reviews.Name: HaJun Yoo
user_reviews.Description:
I visited Ranzo during my trip to Da Nang and it quickly became one of my favorite spots in the city. The location is super convenient, just steps away from the famous Pink Cathedral and the Han River area, making it perfect for lunch or dinner after sightseeing.  ￼

From the start, the restaurant had a clean, modern yet cozy vibe — a noticeable step up from many street places. The staff were friendly and attentive, even giving good suggestions on what to try.

user_reviews.Name: Roberto Jeong-heum Yeon
user_reviews.Description:
Lan Gio restaurant! It was by far the best meal I had in Da Nang.

​Not only was the food incredibly tasty, but the plating was also beautiful. It was a feast for both the eyes and the palate.

​In particular, the Spicy Intestine Pho and the Baby Squid Pho (non-spicy) were absolutely fantastic.

​A quick heads-up: the cream and butter-based shrimp dish (not the cereal shrimp) can be quite rich and heavy. Older people might not enjoy it, so please keep that in mind.

​Also, only order one portion of fried rice! The portions are huge, so it's much better to just get one and try other dishes instead. The Banh Xeo, Com Tam, and Bun Cha were all delicious as well.

​If I had to point out two minor complaints:

1. ​The payment process is a bit confusing. You have to order via a mobile link, and then manually press a "request bill" button in your order history to pay. There are no clear instructions for this, which could definitely be difficult for older guests.

2. ​The Google Review promotion is a bit awkward. If you show them your review at checkout, they give you a takeout drink instead of a discount on your current bill. The timing is weird because you usually write a review after eating, but you want your drinks with your food. Most people already have beer with their meal, and we aren't alcoholics who want to walk down the street sipping a takeout beer right after a big dinner.

​Just to be clear, I am writing this review without receiving any freebies. The takeout beer mentioned above was given to my companion who wrote a review, not me.

​Overall, it was a great experience and I look forward to visiting again!

user_reviews.Name: Gia Hân Hoàng
user_reviews.Description: I am a local and live here, and I went to many tourist-friendly restaurants, but for this one I was genuinely impressed. The food was delicious and well-seasoned. As a Vietnamese, I believe these dishes are some of the best options for tourists to try. The atmosphere feels upscale, like dining in a luxury setting while still enjoying authentic Vietnamese cuisine. My husband and I were both very satisfied with the experience. The staff were kind, attentive, and always ready to help. They even offered to take a photo for us and print it, which was a lovely touch. Must try!!!

user_reviews.Name: Ken Chang
user_reviews.Description:
We had an exceptional dining experience at this Vietnamese gourmet restaurant in Da Nang—truly unlike any typical Vietnamese spot. Every dish we ordered was beautifully presented and packed with flavor, showing incredible attention to detail and creativity.

The razor clams were fresh and perfectly prepared, while the squid pho was rich, aromatic, and wonderfully balanced. The spicy tripe pho was a standout—bold, comforting, and full of depth without overpowering the palate. It’s rare to find such refined takes on classic Vietnamese dishes executed at this level.

The service was impeccable from start to finish: warm, attentive, and professional without being intrusive. Combined with the elegant atmosphere, it made for a memorable evening.

If you’re looking for elevated Vietnamese cuisine in Da Nang, this place is an absolute must-visit. Highly recommended.

user_reviews.Name: Mika Vainio
user_reviews.Description:
A true gluten-free haven in Da Nang

After one week in Hoi An, we had fully arrived in Vietnamese reality — and that includes realizing that the meaning of “gluten-free” and especially “celiac disease” is almost unknown in many places. Eating safely can become quite challenging.

When we came to Da Nang, we were therefore very excited to visit Emo’s after seeing it mentioned in a YouTube Short about the best restaurants with gluten-free options.

And wow — we were absolutely not disappointed!

For the first time during our trip, our daughter could choose freely from a wide variety of dishes. Only the noodle and pancake dishes were not possible. Everything else can be prepared gluten-free on request, using fish sauce instead of soy sauce. The team truly understands what gluten-free means, which gave us so much peace of mind.

And the best part: the food was incredibly delicious. So good, in fact, that we ended up coming back every single evening.

A huge thank you to the entire team — you are amazing! We can highly recommend Emo’s to anyone looking for authentic Vietnamese cuisine with safe and reliable gluten-free options in Da Nang.

user_reviews.Name: Benjamin Khachaturian
user_reviews.Description: Advanced flavor notes, amazing sauces, and delicately marinated meats across a variety of Vietnamese dishes that you’ll love. The Emo’s Plate, Eggplant & Tofu, and the Chicken Bahn Mi were just spectacular and highlights some lovely Vietnamese cuisines. Food came out super hot which was delightful also. Free WiFi, friendly staff, great prices for the complex and beautifully presented dishes. Flavor packed! Nice chill music and ambiance too. Very convenient that they accept Visa credit card also. Certainly matches or beats the Michelin listed restaurants we’ve tried in Da Nang. And a very cute doggy to top off the experience. 🐶 Don’t miss Emo’s! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

user_reviews.Name: YK Lai
user_reviews.Description: The outlet is situated at a quiet lane. The staff are friendly. We like the food. The price is reasonable, I would say quite affordable. As this is the first I come to Danang, I could not tell if it is special sauce that accompanied with the fried chicken breast, but the sauce is really good. It is made of passion fruit and fish sauce. So it is sweet and salty. I wanted order for an Americano, guess what. A can of Huda beer is much cheaper here. By the way , there are quite some beautiful drawings around here. Definitely make you feel good.

user_reviews.Name: Rory
user_reviews.Description: A lovely restaurant located on a quiet street close to the beach. The atmosphere was very relaxed, and the service was great, very quick and friendly. The food was amazing with great flavours, one of the best meals we’ve had in Da Nang so far - we ordered Emos signature rice, stir fried rice with chicken, morning glory and fries. Everything was freshly prepared, cooked perfectly, and well presented. The complimentary passion fruit was a nice touch, we will definitely be back!

user_reviews.Name: Tim Tense
user_reviews.Description:
I really liked this place.

It’s tucked away in a quiet little alley, far from the traffic and honking. That already makes it special. It feels calm and peaceful. Very nice atmosphere.

The service was great. Friendly, kind, and relaxed. You feel welcome right away.

I had the lemongrass chicken with rice, and it was really good. Very tasty. The chicken was soft and full of flavor.

What I liked most is the location. No noise. No stress. You can just sit, relax, and enjoy your food.

It was a real pleasure to eat here. I’ll definitely come back.

user_reviews.Name: Hijab Diaries
user_reviews.Description:
We came here twice because we loved their food.

We tried different dishes and had their
- Spicy beef Pho ( Flavourful broth with a slight kick of heat which we liked. Beef was tender. A must try)

- Seafood Fried Rice (very nice and generous with the seafood. The rice was flavourful when adding the soy sauce)

- Bon Cha ( Beef patty with sweet garlicky chilli sauce and rice vermicelli. It was interesting taste, had the sweet, sour, spicy. The only thing is the beef was like spam and I don't really fancy spam)

- calamari (delicious & crispy batter fried to perfection!)

Will definitely recommend coming here to eat.

user_reviews.Name: Syrristen
user_reviews.Description:
A great place to eat! Prices are very affordable, the food is delicious and the vibes are very chill and high quality. The staff ate very polite and friendly, always smiling and answering any questions you may have.

We've been here on two occasions and it's been the best restaurant we've been to in Da Nang that hasn't been a buffet.

They don't use tapwater and they don't use MSG (the powder).

All our meals tasted great, had high quality and was very healthy.

The decor in the restaurant is pleasant and easy on the eyes, and the location is in a pretty cool street with places for desserts afterwards.

10/10 will go again if I come back to Da Nang 😁

user_reviews.Name: Vidar Granberg
user_reviews.Description:
Clay Pot Bar & Restaurant:
Great Food, drinks & Nightlife

I recently visited Clay Pot Bar & Restaurant, which just opened, and so far I’ve only tried the bar and food, but it’s been impressive. First off, the menu stands out with healthy, tasty bar food that’s beautifully presented. It’s not the usual greasy bar snacks you get at night; they clearly put real effort into quality dishes that feel fresh and thoughtful.
The location is perfect, you have to see it to get it. Tables surround the corner bar, so you’re right in the middle of the nightlife, watching people come and go like you’re part of it all. My favorite part is the constant fresh sea breeze flowing through this open-air spot. Even inside, the space feels airy, with a stunning bar desk made from special woods sourced from northern Vietnam.🇻🇳
Several nights a week, they have live music 🎶 right outside on the corner, which amps up the pub vibe. I can see this becoming a go-to for tourists and locals alike. They even stock some local beer brands you won’t find everywhere, my pick is the local Coffee Stout beer 🍺. The owners’ attention to quality and details shines through. I’ll be back to try the restaurant during the day; that menu looks exceptional. I’ve attached some pictures and video but you really have to go there to get the authentic experience. 🇻🇳🍺🎶🥘

user_reviews.Name: Al Dacillo
user_reviews.Description:
We had an absolutely wonderful dining experience at Claypot Bar & Restaurant during our visit to Da Nang. The food was exceptional, and the highlight of the evening was definitely the Australian steak—it was cooked perfectly, incredibly tender, and literally melted in your mouth.

As a Filipino, I was pleasantly surprised and delighted to see that they serve San Miguel Beer. It was great to enjoy a taste of home while in Vietnam, and I truly appreciate the support of a beloved Philippine product by a local Vietnamese business.

The atmosphere was fantastic as well. They had live music featuring smooth jazz performances, which perfectly matched my vibe and made the evening even more enjoyable. It created a relaxing and sophisticated ambiance that complemented the dining experience beautifully.

The service was outstanding from start to finish. The entire waitstaff was attentive, friendly, and consistently checked on us to ensure everything was perfect. Despite the restaurant being busy, the service was impressively fast and efficient.

A special mention goes to the owner, Ledang, who was incredibly kind, approachable, and welcoming. She personally took the time to check on us and ask about our experience, which we truly appreciated. That personal touch made us feel valued as guests and added to the warmth of the restaurant.

Overall, we had an amazing experience and highly recommend Claypot Bar & Restaurant to anyone visiting Da Nang. From the delicious food and excellent service to the great atmosphere and wonderful hospitality, everything exceeded our expectations. We will definitely be returning on our next visit to Da Nang!

title: Vietnom Local Eatery
address: 97 Mai Thúc Lân, Ngũ Hành Sơn, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam
plus_code: 26XV+4G Ngu Hanh Son, Da Nang, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Reviewer
user_reviews.Description:
Vietnom Local Eatery was one of the most memorable dining experiences I had in Da Nang. The food was absolutely delicious, with authentic Vietnamese flavors, fresh ingredients, and beautiful presentation. Every dish we ordered was excellent, and the atmosphere was warm, welcoming, and relaxed.

What makes this restaurant truly special is its deaf staff. As someone who has experience interacting with deaf people, I appreciated how thoughtfully the restaurant is set up to make communication easy and comfortable. The staff were professional, attentive, and genuinely friendly. A smile, eye contact, simple gestures, and a little patience go a long way, and the experience felt completely natural and enjoyable.

I was impressed by how confidently and efficiently the team worked together. Rather than feeling like a novelty, it felt like exactly what it should be—a great restaurant with talented people providing excellent service. It was also a wonderful reminder that communication comes in many forms and that kindness and respect are universal.

Combined with the outstanding food and welcoming atmosphere, Vietnom Local Eatery is a place I would highly recommend to anyone visiting Da Nang. It offers not only a fantastic meal but also a meaningful and positive experience that stays with you long after you leave.

user_reviews.Description: When it comes to non-pretentious, affordable, yet delicious dining, it’s hard to beat vietnom local eatery. It’s good for lunch, it’s good for dinner. It’s also nice to see how this place serves as a hub for mute folks to gather and enjoy good food and good company.

user_reviews.Description:
It was a lovely restaurant with a charming atmosphere. I especially liked that they also sold small items like artwork and postcards, which added a unique touch to the place. The interior was beautifully decorated, although it was unfortunately a bit noisy.

The service was very friendly, and the food tasted great overall. However, there was an issue with my vegan bowl—it unfortunately contained salmon, which is not vegan, as it is a type of fish. Because of this, I had to remove it instead of fully enjoying the dish as intended.

Aside from that, the food was very delicious, and I truly enjoyed my time there.

user_reviews.Name: Brad Passmore
user_reviews.Description:
I’ve eaten at Ca Go multiple times and it consistently delivers. The food is excellent—every dish is prepared with care and you can tell they focus on quality, not just volume. For the level of flavor and presentation, the prices are surprisingly low.

Service is another standout. Staff are attentive, professional, and make the experience smooth without being overbearing.

The atmosphere is calm and relaxed, which is rare for beachside spots. The view overlooking the ocean adds a great touch without the usual noise and chaos you get in tourist-heavy areas.

Overall, this is a place that gets the fundamentals right: great food, fair pricing, solid service, and a peaceful setting. Easy recommendation.

user_reviews.Name: Светлана Красильникова
user_reviews.Description:
Absolutely Phenomenal in Every Way! Our Best Meal in Da Nang!

Cá Gỗ Vietnamese Restaurant is more than just a place to eat; it's a complete and incredibly atmospheric journey into the heart of Vietnam.

From the very first moment, you are captivated by its charm. The atmosphere is incredible—a cozy, meticulously designed interior that clearly has a designer's touch. The warm lighting, natural materials, pleasant background music, and a certain serene spirit create the perfect setting for a romantic dinner or a quiet gathering with friends.

But the true magic, of course, is on the plate! The food is nothing short of spectacular. We sampled several dishes, and each one was a masterpiece. The flavors are so fresh, vibrant, and perfectly balanced—you can truly feel that everything is prepared with soul and the finest ingredients. It's the authentic taste of Vietnam that you'll remember long after the meal is over.

And finally, the service is impeccable. The staff is incredibly attentive, polite, and anticipatory. They were delighted to help us navigate the menu, explaining everything in detail, and took care of our comfort throughout the entire lunch in a wonderfully unobtrusive way.

Without a doubt, this is one of those rare restaurants you dream of returning to again and again. If you are in Da Nang, Cá Gỗ is an absolute must-visit! 10/10

user_reviews.Name: Katherine Kavanagh
user_reviews.Description: Went to Brilliant Restaurant in Danang for supper last night.  Service was excellent and the food was great!  I ordered the Pineapple Fried Rice and the kind waitress told me the portion would be too big for two people.  We settled for Egg Fried Rice and Crab Meat Omelette!  The omelette came with some Rice Noodle drenched with a special Fish Sauce,  which was pretty nostalgic for me.  Overall, it was a pleasant experience for both of us.

title: Le Bambino French Restaurant
address: 122/11 Quang Trung, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Yannick Quilis
user_reviews.Description:
I had a wonderful time at Bambino restaurant!

The quality of the food and service was impeccable.

I ordered foie gras as a starter and escargots as a main course: a refined and delicious dish.

I highly recommend this restaurant for an authentic French culinary experience.
user_reviews.text_original:
I had a wonderful time at Bambino restaurant!

I ordered foie gras as a starter and escargots as a main course: a refined and delicious dish.

user_reviews.Name: Benjamin Ho
user_reviews.Description: Super friendly staff. Amazing value, hearty, delicious, happy French cuisine. Homely little restaurant with a casual family-friendly vibe. Not your snobby Michelin starred French restaurant but a must-try if you are looking for amazing authentic French food in this cultural ex-French colony town. Been coming here repeatedly with my family over the past ten years!!

user_reviews.Name: markc990
user_reviews.Description: my wife and i dined here many times. and without fail, we had a great experience. the food is great, the waitstaff is great and the owners are great. each and every time we dined there the two owners spoke with us in a down to earth manner…nothing phony about their demeanor. they truly are concerned about their customers and you feel very welcomed. ||||the food was superb each time we visited. the menu has a good variety to offer and it can be a challenge to decide which meal to order because so many sound so good. the layout of the restaurant gives you the choice to either dine indoors with air-conditioning or outdoors at poolside.||||being in an alleyway off the busy and noisy street you can enjoy peace and quiet while you dine. ||||during our latter visits to this restaurant, my wife was very pregnant…the owners, of course, would inquire of her well being and even invited us to use the swimming pool at our leisure. we were amazed at their hospitality!!  my wife has since given birth and so we have not been there lately…but i can assure you that things have not changed one bit…still a highly recommended place to eat while in danang.

user_reviews.Name: April
user_reviews.Description: A friend recommended this place to us, said it’s a good French restaurant. Came with some expectations despite reading some bad reviews. Onion soup was a failure , onion is not caramelized. Ordered a lamb shank, and it looks … unappealing with it color. The goat cheese salad had some mulled wines apples.. that was interesting but too sweet. Ambience was nice here but don’t expect good French food here. Expect home cook amateur style then you won’t be disappointed

user_reviews.Name: Robert Kie
user_reviews.Description: I read many reviews saying that the service and food here were excellent, so I had high hopes for a wonderful evening but things didn’t turn out as I expected. The food was reasonably priced, the beef was tasty and tender, though it didn’t really leave a strong impression on me. The foie gras were just average. However, the worst part was probably the service. I’ve been to many other restaurants in Da Nang but this was the first time I’ve ever seen staff using their phones while customers were present, that shouldn’t happen, right? There was a bald man hiding in a corner, secretly using his phone. I looked at him for quite a while to ask about the food, I even called him but it seems like he doesn't care, he just kept staring at his phone until another waiter noticed me and came over. When I went to the restroom, I saw him watching videos on TikTok and Facebook, it was really disappointing to witness that. In addition, I also saw a man who looked like the manager sitting by the pool, completely focused on his phone as well. Does he even know about this issue? Do Mr. Jean Paul and Ms. Vinh know about these behaviors? When the staff were cleaning the table after the previous guests left, they brushed everything off onto the floor, it looked really unhygienic. The tables and some other objects looked quite dusty, as if they hadn’t been cleaned regularly and even the glass was dirty. Overall, I had high expectations for this restaurant but things didn’t really live up to them — even the staff at small street food stalls don’t use their phones while working. The restaurant was very quiet with only a few guests, and I think I understand the reason for that. I hope the owners will read my review, as I didn’t get the chance to meet them when I visited.

title: Pizza 4P's Indochina Da Nang
address: 74 Bạch Đằng, Street, Hải Châu, Đà Nẵng 550000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: z y
user_reviews.Description:
Pizza 4P’s never disappoints. As usual, the food was amazing and the pizza was absolutely delicious, easily one of the reasons this place is always my go to whenever I’m in Vietnam. The quality and flavours are consistently great, and every visit reminds me why it’s such a favourite.

Service was also wonderful. Our dessert got delayed a little, but the staff were incredibly sweet and apologetic about it. Honestly, there was really no need to apologise. I completely understand how busy things can get in a kitchen, especially during peak hours, as a chef myself. I really appreciated how sincere and attentive they were though.

Overall, it was a really lovely dining experience. Great food, warm service, and a place I’ll always make time to visit whenever I’m in Vietnam.

user_reviews.Name: Raphael Quismorio
user_reviews.Description:
Everything is so good here  that’s why it’s truly highly recommended in Vietnam! We’re currently in Da Nang and visited their branch at Indochina Riverside, and it absolutely did not disappoint.
We ordered the 4 Cheese Pizza, Burrata Prosciutto Pizza, Bolognese, Crab Tomato Pasta, Parma Ham, Mango Squid Salsa, and Clam Chowder  and we loved every single dish.

The pizzas were rich and flavorful, the pasta was perfectly cooked, and the seafood dishes were fresh and delicious. Every plate was beautifully prepared and full of flavor.

The quality, taste, and overall dining experience were excellent. We’ll definitely come back next time we’re in Da Nang! Highly recommended!

The staff are also very commendable as they are always checking up on us.

user_reviews.Name: Corissa Chee
user_reviews.Description:
I made the booking on the wrong date but is thankful they’re able to still provide us seatings less than 5mins of wait at 12pm on a Thursday.
Service is steadfast, good, and reliable by the staffs and by Ngoc who served my table.

I ordered:

1. Half-&-half pizza (4 Cheese / Burrata Parma Ham): crust was thin, light, and fluffy with spot-on flavors. Not the crispy kind of style tho
2. Crab Pasta: rich and well-balance with the crab flavour and creamy tomato base
3. Potato with Raclette cheese: pure heaven with the herbs flavour
4. Kale salad: average dish. I feel like that they could do more with this salad

Overall, I would give it a good recommend, especially since it's incredibly good value compared to Singapore prices!

user_reviews.Name: MX Yan
user_reviews.Description:
I can't rave enough of this place. The food is amazing. Ordered the half and half of 4 cheese and burata parma cheese. Had to order one more pizza cos it was just too good. Also ordered the salmon cream fettuccine.

The service was nothing short of exceptional. We had a short episode of mayhem where my son lost his specs in the grabcar we came to the restaurant in. The staff helped us contact the grab driver so readily. We are so grateful. One of the staff Ha Vi also left a deep impression on us. She out of initiative portioned out our pasta into 4 smaller bowls. She also engaged the kids giving them colouring kits and talking to them.

The ambience is of course lovely, given its wide windows overlooking the river.

Would love to come here again. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Jadin Dam
user_reviews.Description:
Coming from America who I think has a wide range of great pizza (sorry Italy), I was really impressed by Pizza 4P’s.

I first ate here in March 2025 when my friends had a welcome party for their wedding, and I was so impressed that I came back again in November 2025.

The taste really stayed with me-it was so delicious, and I want to come back and eat here many more times.

What impressed me the most, though, was the restaurant’s thoughtful way of handling service.

The last dish we ordered came out later than the expected time, and they offered it for free and took responsibility for the delay without us asking.

We didn’t feel it was late at all because we were eating and talking and not paying attention to the time, and we didn’t even want the restaurant to comp the dish.

However, the manager still decided to make it free. It was truly amazing and thoughtful.

I will definitely come back many more times if I have the chance!
user_reviews.text_original:
Coming from America who I think has a wide range of great pizza (sorry Italy), I was really impressed by Pizza 4P’s.

I first ate here in March 2025 when my friends had a welcome party for their wedding, and I was so impressed that I came back again in November 2025.

The taste really stayed with me-it was so delicious, and I want to come back and eat here many more times.

What impressed me the most, though, was the restaurant’s thoughtful way of handling service.

The last dish we ordered came out later than the expected time, and they offered it for free and took responsibility for the delay without us asking.

We didn’t feel it was late at all because we were eating and talking and not paying attention to the time, and we didn’t even want the restaurant to comp the dish.

However, the manager still decided to make it free. It was truly amazing and thoughtful.

I will definitely come back many more times if I have the chance!
user_reviews.reply_text_original:

We are especially grateful for your appreciation of our service. At Pizza 4P’s, we always aim to ensure that every guest feels well taken care of, and we are glad that our team’s response to the delayed dish was meaningful to you. Your recognition truly encourages us to keep up our commitment to hospitality and guest care.

Thank you once again for your continued support and kind words. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back many more times in the future.

Warm regards,
Pizza 4P’s Team

user_reviews.Name: Isabelle Ng
user_reviews.Description:
Excellent service from start to finish. We were able to get two beachfront sunbeds (free), just by ordering drinks while we stayed — which felt like great value. We didn’t make a reservation and only had to wait about 10 minutes for beds to open up, which was totally reasonable.

The overall vibe was really relaxed and chilled, especially compared to Kala Kala, which felt a bit more busy and high-energy. This spot is perfect if you’re looking for a more laid-back beach club experience.
